college_info.intro:
DY Patil University School of Management's popular programme is the MBA. The school offers MBA in Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Operation Management, Banking & Insurance, Business Analytics, and others. DY Patil Mumbai offers quality education to students under the guidance of expert teachers.
Overall, DY Patil University School of Management is one of the best colleges present in India. The school is ranked 35th by the Times and 93rd by the Business Today. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by DY Patil University School of Management and their respective eligibility:

placements.overview: Dr DY Patil University's School of Management (DYPUSM) placements 2024 have not been released. The highest package offered during DY Patil Mumbai MBA placement 2023 stood at INR 10.04 LPA. The average package ranged between INR 6 LPA and INR 7 LPA. The top recruiters are Accenture, Deloitte, Airtel, Sony, Capgemini, Jio, Adani Group, ICICI Bank, Pfizer, ONGC, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Finance - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college definitely recommended.

review_content.Placements: I do not know about the highest and the lowest, but students have got nice jobs in some nice companies. My batchmates, most of them, have got placements. Some of them got great packages, while some got like the average package, but they are all satisfied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen is recently renovated, and the food quality is amazing, according to the price. The service is good too, I used to get food quickly so that I can also eat between my lectures, and also the behavior of the staff is great and they are friendly, and the taste is good too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Sept 2025)- MBA in Marketing Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, amazing infrastructure, and knowledgeable staff.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered by this college is 18 LPA and the lowest is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Tata, Reliance and EY. Most students get placed as Sales Executives, Sales Managers or Marketing Heads. The college has a higher reach than expected which allows for networking communication and connections with industry professionals.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has top-notch facilities and infrastructure like no other. The food quality and hygiene in the canteen are good and the prices are reasonable. There are medical facilities on campus for emergencies. The college also has its own sports complex so students can spend their time productively.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Marketing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the faculty, average infrastructure and very poor placements.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 280 students in the BBA batch. With almost 120 choosing the marketing honors. The highest package for BBA graduates is barely 5 LPA. And the average package for BBA revolves around 3-4 lpa. There's no major company recruiting in this college. Just some local businesses who recruit from our college. Our college does not provide any internships at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom has a projector and digital board, along with a blackboard. It also has ACs and fans in the classrooms. There is a library on campus and a computer lab (in which the majority computers don't work). The canteen is nice, and the food service is also good. There are no medical facilities and no grounds for playing sports as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in International Business - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My opinion for this amazing college.

review_content.Placements: Students scoring above 50% can apply for a BBA course; in the 2nd year, they offer a few internships that are suitable for your field and also train you for the same. The placement is given in big MNC companies as well as normal companies, wherever you get selected for your role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure of the whole campus, beautiful ambiance and vibe in class, cafeteria service also available, every year a few amazing events to take a break from the daily routine of studies, and not to forget, they have really nice foods and quantities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Sept 2025)- BBA in Hospital Administration - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The university is best for BBA Hospital Administration students.

review_content.Placements: The average package at D Y Patil University for BBA HA students will be approximately 15k-20k. Good hospitals in Mumbai and Navi Mumbai come for placements. Internships are provided by the university itself. Roles such as operation executive, quality executive, and marketing roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that good as space is small, but the overall classroom sizes are good, and libraries are equipped with good resources and books. The quality of food in the canteen is average, and other activities like sports and games are frequently organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued(Sept 2025)- MBA in Finance Management - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of DY Patil University School of Management.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell helps throughout to help you get placed in various opportunities in banks, start-ups, a few corporate companies, and government agencies, and taxation companies roles like associate, management trainee, analyst, etc. are offered. The highest package was around 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel living space is good; we do have washing machines for laundry service, good and hygienic food, and shared room facilities. There is limited scope for sports and medical facilities. The department is good to go, and classrooms are comfortable spaces, and labs are also there.

admission_overview.college_name: DY Patil University School of Management Admission 2025 (Open): MBA Fee, Last date to apply, Application, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: DY Patil University School of Management Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: DY Patil University School of Management, Mumbai admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based; however, merit-based admissions are also offered depending on the course. Also known as DYPUSM, the institute offers courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses include BBA, MBA, Business Analytics, PhD, Certificate and Value Added courses. The application process commences online via the official website of the institute. The institute offers its programmes in Aviation, Engineering, Science, Medicine & Health Science, etc. Popular courses offered by the university are MBA and BBA. Read on to know more about DY Patil University School of Management course admissions 2025.

eligibility_selection.title: DY Patil University School of Management Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: DY Patil University School of Management course admission is subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The college offers courses in the fields of Aviation, Engineering, Science, Medicine & Health Science, etc, in full-time mode. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. The institute shortlists candidates based on either the institute-level test or scores obtained in any of the national/ state-level exams, such as CAT/ MAT, etc. The table below carries the eligibility and selection criteria for DY Patil University School of Management courses: Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with a minimum of 50% marks in any discipline or equivalent from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: Merit/ DYPCET/ CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ MH CET + GDPI + Work Experience and Extra Curricular Activities

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 45% aggregate from a recognised board
Postgraduation with a minimum aggregate of 55% from a recognised university
Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board

faqs.answer: DY Patil University School of Management admissions are mainly entrance-based. Students seeking to enrol into any of the courses offered at the institute need to ensure that they qualify for the desired programme before starting the application process. The institute accepts scores obtained in national-level exams, such as CAT/  MAT, etc., or in state-level exam: MAH CET.
faqs.question: Are DY Patil University School of Management admissions merit or entrance-based?

faqs.answer: D.Y. Patil University Navi Mumbai is the part of DYPUSM in which you can apply in BBA and MBA course directly by filling online application and pay the fees for the same. There will be an interview which is the part of addmission process. The details of all admission process is available on the official website and the eligibility criteria is to have a graduation degree with minimum 50 percent marks.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in School of Management D.Y. Patil University Navi Mumbai?

faqs.answer: The minimum cutoff percentiles for MBA admissions have not yet been released by the DY Patil University School of Management. Usually, cutoffs are announced closer to the dates of admission.However, based on previous years' cutoff trends, here are some indicative percentiles that can set as targets:CAT Cutoffs:- General Category: 60 to 65 percentile- Reserved Categories: 55 to 60 percentileCMAT Cutoffs:- General Category: 80+ percentile- Reserved Categories: 65+ percentile

admission_process.title: DY Patil University School of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred course. Aspirants have to register and then fill out the application form. The application fee is non-refundable and can be paid via any of the online payment modes.

The institute considers merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for BBA. For MBA, the institute considers scores in MAH MBA CET, CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT or GMAT. Candidates selected for MBA have further to pass the GDPI round conducted by the institute.
Once the selection process is over, the institute releases a merit list. Selected students need to pay theDYPUSM feesto confirm their seat in the institute.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Information Technology Lab

reviews.review_heading: Nice college definitely recommended.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is recently renovated, and the food quality is amazing, according to the price. The service is good too, I used to get food quickly so that I can also eat between my lectures, and also the behavior of the staff is great and they are friendly, and the taste is good too.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, amazing infrastructure, and knowledgeable staff.
reviews.review_text: This college has top-notch facilities and infrastructure like no other. The food quality and hygiene in the canteen are good and the prices are reasonable. There are medical facilities on campus for emergencies. The college also has its own sports complex so students can spend their time productively.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty, average infrastructure and very poor placements.
reviews.review_text: The classroom has a projector and digital board, along with a blackboard. It also has ACs and fans in the classrooms. There is a library on campus and a computer lab (in which the majority computers don't work). The canteen is nice, and the food service is also good. There are no medical facilities and no grounds for playing sports as well.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion for this amazing college.
reviews.review_text: Amazing infrastructure of the whole campus, beautiful ambiance and vibe in class, cafeteria service also available, every year a few amazing events to take a break from the daily routine of studies, and not to forget, they have really nice foods and quantities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is best for BBA Hospital Administration students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good as space is small, but the overall classroom sizes are good, and libraries are equipped with good resources and books. The quality of food in the canteen is average, and other activities like sports and games are frequently organized.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DY Patil University School of Management.
reviews.review_text: The hostel living space is good; we do have washing machines for laundry service, good and hygienic food, and shared room facilities. There is limited scope for sports and medical facilities. The department is good to go, and classrooms are comfortable spaces, and labs are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Really well developed infrastructure, faculty members and events.
reviews.review_text: As we enter the college, we can see a beautifully developed college canteen, and the food that they offer is really delicious. Moving upstairs to the second floor, we have our college library and computer lab, which are really helpful in our studies and guidance. Furthermore, on the 4th and 5th floors, we have our classrooms, each comprising air conditioning and projectors, helping us understand our subjects better. Additionally, we have a medical aid room and a sports room. The college hosts re...

reviews.review_heading: I am enjoying my college life in this campus and participating in all the events .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, lifts are all working, and teachers are very helpful; they make sure that everyone understands the topic. All topics are covered twice in the same lecture. They also support us in working in our own way. The IT lab is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: BBA is not worth and not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average and the campus is like a school. Amenities provided in our college are average. The cafeteria is of medium size. Most of the classrooms have air-conditioners but they don't work.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Management, D.Y. Patil University.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a hostel but the hostels that are available nearby the college have a student-friendly atmosphere and rooms. They allot a student in a room and is affordable. Girls and boys have separate hostels. Many students from different places come to study at our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with various MBA programs which focus on making students industry-ready.
reviews.review_text: All necessary facilities are available here. Students get high-speed Wi-Fi. The canteen facility is available for students. Labs provide additional help to students in their studies. The library facility is available with a number of books for all management courses.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for MBA to gain industry backed knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. There are big classrooms, I. T labs, Canteen, Sports room, Cultural room, Auditorium and a big stadium of D. Y. Patil which encourages students to participate in various sports events. Hostel facilities is also available for students who lives outstation.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but did not satisfied with infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The course content is built very nicely a student from any field ie Science commerce or arts can get easily through it college also has a good library equipped with modern computer facilities you get nice classrooms equipped with projector and AC .

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience for college was good.
reviews.review_text: College is not so huge but still it is good all the facilities are available which students needs, all the necessary equipment are present in IT lab and in library. All the books are update you can easily get the books related to your subjects, canteen food is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: The best thing about the college is faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have fully Wi-Fi enabled college, the canteen was okay. The college is haven for athletes and sports-persons, since the college has top class amenities for sports. You get a big library and good computer lab as well. The classrooms are equipped with ACs.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Government Polytechnic Pune Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

placements.overview: Government Polytechnic, Pune offers placement every year. At every stage of the placement process, including the management of pre-placement meetings, written examinations, group activities, and individual interviews, the Government Polytechnic Pune placement unit provides assistance to visiting firms. The cell also helps institution departments arrange student in internships throughout the summer. The most well-known employers at the college in recent years have been multinational corporations including Tata Motors, Bajaj Auto, Wipro, Ericsson India Pvt Ltd, IBM, and Eaton. RDC Concrete, ASB International, Kirloskar, and L&T Infotech are just a few of the businesses that visit the campus to recruit students. Here, students make an average income of INR 2.3 LPA, with the maximum compensation being INR 5 LPA.

faqs.answer: A:    After completing the Diploma in Civil Engineering from Government Polytechnic Pune, various options are available like prepare for goverment jobs. Some goverment recruiters are Indian Railways, National Highway Authority of India, ONGC, DRDO, PWD, Water Boards etc. Students also go for Private Sector jobs for various posts like Site Engineer, Quantity Surveyor, Construction Manger, etc some of the private sector recuriters are DLF, L&T-ECC , Tata Reality and infrastructure, Reliance Infras
faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing Diploma in CE from Government Polytechnic Pune?

faqs.answer: A:    Government Polytechnic Pune does not accept any entrance exams for admission to its Diploma in Computer Engineering program. Instead, admission is based on the marks obtained in the 10th class CBSE scorecard. The admission process is centralized and handled by the DTE Maharashtra. Some other documents required for admission include:School leaving certificateITI/HSC/HSC Vocational mark sheet and Leaving Certificate, if applicableCertificate of passing Intermediate Grade Drawing examination, if applicableCaste/Non Creamy/Income Certificate/EWS as per your CategoryCertificate of proper authority like civil surgeon, if physically handicapped

review_summary.college_name: Government Polytechnic Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Top Diploma college of Maharashtra.

content.Placements: You cannot expect more placements from a Diploma college. The 2025-2026 batch had placement opportunities where they shortlisted and gave an internship to 6 students. Not many students take part in campus placements as they focus on studying for the BE/B. Tech. Most companies visiting the campus focus more on other departments like Mechanical, Civil, or Electronics.
content.Infrastructure: The college has many classrooms with sizes big enough to accommodate around 50-60 students, having projectors for teachers to use. Labs are equipped with PCs good enough to perform the practical. IOT kits are also provided to students (ICs, Arduino kits, breadboards, etc.). The hostel system is quite good; each room has 3 students, and a mess system is available for hostelers. The central library has all the books listed in the curriculum.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Polytechnic Pune.

content.Placements: Government Polytechnic Pune is one of the reputed Diploma colleges in Maharashtra. Yet, when it comes to placements in the Computer Engineering department, the institute does not provide direct placement opportunities. Most companies visiting the campus focus more on other departments like Mechanical, Civil or Electronics. For Computer Engineering students, there is no structured campus placement support so the majority of students prefer to pursue higher education (BE /BTech or degree programs) after completing their Diploma. Many students successfully get admission to good engineering colleges through lateral entry which helps them build better career prospects.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students at my college were placed in different companies, and 7.5 lacs is the highest package offered by the retail industry, and the lowest package is about 2 lacs. Cognizant is the top recruiting company. One disadvantage is that the student has to get an internship on their own capabilities; college doesn't interfere in it.

The college has a good Wi-Fi connection in the labs, and the labs have very standard equipment. The quality of the food mess is very cheap; my personal opinion is to join a private mess.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for Government Polytechnic Pune admission?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for admission at Government Polytechnic Pune is July 7, 2024. Centralized Admission Process will be conducted for candidates selected through merit. The college offers fourteen diploma courses. To be eligible for the course, the candidates must have passed class 10th from any recognised board.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Government Polytechnic Pune for admission to Diploma in CE?
faqs.answer: Government Polytechnic Pune does not accept any entrance exams for admission to its Diploma in Computer Engineering program. Instead, admission is based on the marks obtained in the 10th class CBSE scorecard. The admission process is centralized and handled by the DTE Maharashtra.Some other documents required for admission include:School leaving certificateITI/HSC/HSC Vocational mark sheet and Leaving Certificate, if applicableCertificate of passing Intermediate Grade Drawing examination, if applicableCaste/Non Creamy/Income Certificate/EWS as per your CategoryCertificate of proper authority like civil surgeon, if physically handicapped

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Government Polytechnic Pune for admission to Diploma in CE?
faqs.answer: Government Polytechnic Pune offers a 3 years Diploma in Computer Engineering course at the After 10th level. There are no entrance exams that are accepted by Government Polytechnic Pune for admission to the Diploma program. Only the high school (10th) CBSE scorecard is accepted by Government Polytechnic Pune for admission to the Diploma program.

hostel_campus.college_name: Government Polytechnic Pune Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Top Diploma college of Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The college has many classrooms with sizes big enough to accommodate around 50-60 students, having projectors for teachers to use. Labs are equipped with PCs good enough to perform the practical. IOT kits are also provided to students (ICs, Arduino kits, breadboards, etc.). The hostel system is quite good; each room has 3 students, and a mess system is available for hostelers. The central library has all the books listed in the curriculum.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Polytechnic Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-maintained classrooms, laboratories and a library. Computer labs are equipped but not very advanced compared to those in private colleges. The campus is spacious and located in the heart of Pune making it accessible. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls, but the seats are limited and allotted on a merit basis. The hostel provides basic amenities like a mess, study room and security, though the facilities are simple and not luxu...

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for studying and skills building.
reviews.review_text: As a current student at Government Polytechnic Pune (GPP), I can share that the campus infrastructure is generally well equipped and conducive to learning though there are areas that could benefit from improvement. The hostel is very good for students.

reviews.review_heading: Many reasons to choose GPP.
reviews.review_text: The college is equipped with many advanced machines. The labs are fully working. In my time of practical, I have never faced any problems due to functional machines. The hostel is very clean in comparison, and the mess is also good. Timings are kept for the security of students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very clean and healthy. There are more than 10 hostels, which are very clean and safe with watchmen. The college has a good Wi-Fi connection in the labs, and the labs have very standard equipment. The quality of the food mess is very cheap; my personal opinion is to join a private mess.

reviews.review_heading: Best Diploma College in Pune if you can’t afford the private ones.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is the best when compared to the others departments. We have great facilities of clean and ventilated labs along with 20 computers and a fast internet connection in each lab. Library issues us books for a certain time period but we got to return them.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Polytechnic Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college is pretty old, but it is still maintained the way it should be. The canteen and medical services are also good. There are not a lot of sports and games. The food in the canteen is worth the money. The infrastructure is also good, and from inside there are good Wi-Fi connections.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms and the campus are good. The hostel is not clean. Our college does not provide many facilities. We have a small library. It does not have many books. There is a water problem in the hostel. The hostel staff is not friendly.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best option for the students who are looking for Diploma courses to apply .
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are average but not bad at all for the particular course you have separate labs for practical and have good availability of instruments, computers and practical components. The classrooms are good where you can learn on projected screens.

reviews.review_heading: As per my opinion, the college has good campus placement and a good education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has full Wi-Fi and a big campus. There is one cricket ground and one basketball court on our college campus. Our college environment is also friendly and fully green; classrooms are very neat and clean, and food is better than at other colleges. Our college has two libraries and more than 2800 books available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements of our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities. Many books are available in the library. The quality of food in the mess is average. There are interdepartmental matches in different sports.

reviews.review_heading: My college was good, always provided good placements every years and had good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs with the latest software and hardware are avilable. Workshops with various tools and equipments for hands on training, libraries with books, journals, and other learning resources are there too. Mess facilities for daily meals is there. Laundry and housekeeping services, 24hrs security and surveillance are available.

reviews.review_heading: Students can get admission to this college because of its good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not good or modern because of its old construction. It has a good library and laboratories with working equipment. It has good classrooms. It has good toilets and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provided good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are the best in our college. The library is good. Wi-Fi is enabled on campus. Laboratory is also decent. Classrooms are good, and the benches are also better. There are good facilities in our classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for doing a diploma.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was great, but only for IT and CSE departments. For others, lectures were conducted in old buildings, which were not that great. The same goes for the benches and classroom quality. The rest of the facilities, like labs and libraries, were good. Wi-Fi was not available for students. However, we could use labs to access the internet. The infrastructure of our hostel was not good. The mess and canteen were also not up to the mark. GPP was well known for its sports culture. There...

college_info.intro:
GD Goenka University comprises more than 9 constituent schools and departments, including the School of Engineering & Sciences, the School of Management, and the School of Liberal Arts, among others. These schools extend a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels, across various streams. Among these courses the GD Goenka MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
GD Goenka University Gurugram offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The MBA programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Marketing, HR, International Business, etc. during the first year. While in the second year, the university extends various major and minor specialisation options to students. Students also have the option to pursue their MBA degree with an additional specialisation in either Fintech or Business Analytics.
The GD Goenka BTech programme offered by GD Goenka University is a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc. Check out the below video to know all about BTech at GD Goenka University:
Interested students can learn more about the other popular courses at GD Goenka University Gurgaon below:

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with it. Students must visit the university.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placements. The package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Lenskart and Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital. 100% of students got internships from Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital, Dayal Eye Centre, and Ahooja Eye Hospital. In our course, mostly, roles are offered to all students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available for students like a peaceful library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The infrastructure is very attractive and unique from other universities. The hostel is similar to the classroom building. It has all facilities in the hostel like Wi-Fi, mess food, and all these things are very good.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: The placement was really not good. You had to work on yourself for your placement. Only 10% of students got placed through the university. By teacher referrals, they also provided internships. Overall, the system or university was good if you could work hard on yourself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members were good. The library was well-maintained, and medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were also good. You could participate in any co-curricular activities, as all were conducted by the university. The university environment was good for improving your personal growth.

overview_faqs.question: What is the duration of the BA course at GD Goenka University?
overview_faqs.answer: The BA (Hons.) programme is a four-year full-time course offered by the GD Goenka university. The university provides a BA (Hons.) programme in three specialisations, following a semester pattern. Candidate selection is based on a combination of merit and the entrance exam. All applications must be submitted before the BA admissions deadline at GD Goenka University.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the BCom programme at GD Goenka University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for the BCom programme at GD Goenka University is INR 1,000 for all applicants, and applications can be submitted online or offline.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total fee of BDes at Unitedworld Institute of Design, GD Goenka University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BDes course at Unitedworld Institute of Design, GD Goenka University is INR 11 Lacs - INR 17 lakh. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as transportation charges, admission fee, and various other charges.

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fee of MBA at GD Goenka University?
overview_faqs.answer: The course fee of MBA at GD Goenka University is range between INR 7 Lacs to INR 8 lakh. However, for better understanding, students can check the table presented below:Course*Total Course FeeMBAINR 7 Lacs to INR 8 lakh*The total course fee is gathered from external sources.

review_summary.college_name: GD Goenka University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very glad to take admission in such a good university.

content.Placements: I don't know more about placement because last year I took admission here. But I heard from our seniors that placement depends on the student's results, and top companies participate here. All students get internships in special hospitals like Fortis and Medanta. It provides very good facilities by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the building is well-built and of high-quality labs. Classrooms are digital. Library is very well furnished, and all books are available here. The quality of hostel is like a 5 star hostel, and medical facilities are also available. Food quality at hostel is very excellent.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: GD Goenka University is a good private college recognized by UGC, BCI, ICAR, PCI, and NAAC.

content.Placements: About 70% to 80% of students in our M.Pharm course get placed. The highest package is 18–20 LPA, the lowest is 3–7 LPA, and the average is 10–12 LPA. Recruiting companies include Medanta, Sun Pharma, Fortis, GRC Healthcare, and others. Around 80% of students get internships at Sun Pharma, like Regulatory Affairs and QA/QC.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, pharmaceutical labs, library, CIL labs, machine room, gym, cafeteria, swimming pool, football ground, archery room, badminton rooms, table tennis court, lawn tennis court, pool room, steam and spa rooms are all available. The quality of the food is amazing. There is centralized AC, a study room, a common room, a fridge, Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and hygienic washrooms in every room. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with it. Students must visit the university.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placements. The package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Lenskart and Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital. 100% of students got internships from Indira Gandhi Eye Hospital, Dayal Eye Centre, and Ahooja Eye Hospital. In our course, mostly, roles are offered to all students.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available for students like a peaceful library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The infrastructure is very attractive and unique from other universities. The hostel is similar to the classroom building. It has all facilities in the hostel like Wi-Fi, mess food, and all these things are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (BMRIT) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: The placement was really not good. You had to work on yourself for your placement. Only 10% of students got placed through the university. By teacher referrals, they also provided internships. Overall, the system or university was good if you could work hard on yourself.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members were good. The library was well-maintained, and medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were also good. You could participate in any co-curricular activities, as all were conducted by the university. The university environment was good for improving your personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) by NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The facility is good, the environment, and facilities are good. All is good.

content.Placements: It is based on the person and no one on our campus is out for jobs. Top roles offered are like manager, HRO, and high- to low-paid jobs. IBM, Tata, TCS, and some others visit. Maybe 75% are placed in the course. I think. The higher package is 25 LPA and the lower package is 5 LPA, based on students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library are good. Food is mostly North Indian, somewhat nice, and desserts are really tasty. All facilities are excellent. Wi-Fi provides personal access, and daily cleaning of rooms and washrooms, It provides good service in a hostel-like, home-environment.

admission_overview.college_name: GD Goenka University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Process, Fees & Last Dates

admission_overview.title: GD Goenka University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Goenka University admission 2026 is based on the entrance exam. The university offers more than 20 courses including PhD courses under the schools, i.e., School of Engineering and Science, Law, Agricultural Science etc. GD Goenka admission is merit-based and accepts CUET scores for all UG and PG courses. GD Goenka University also accepts national-level entrance exams such as MAT/CAT/CMAT for admission to MBA courses. Furthermore, the institute has introduced the Center of Excellence Occupational Health, Safety, Fire and Environment. The university also accepts national-level exams such as the JEE Main/ GD Goenka Test for BTech programme.

paragraphs: GD Goenka University admissionsare entrance-based for the majority of the programmes. Students who are interested in taking admission for at GD Goenka University can check the points mentioned below:
1. Application Process

The admission process starts with filling GD Goenka University application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website to apply for the course of their choice along with making the fee payment of INR 1,100 for all courses.
2. Selection Process
For MBA courses candidates need to clear CAT/ CMAT/ MAT/ CUET/GD Goenka Test and fulfil of latest eligibility, i.e., class 12. However, for the BTech programme, students need to clear JEE (Main).
3. Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to payGD Goenka University course feeto confirm their seat in the university.

placement_data.title: GD Goenka University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Over 300 companies took part during the GD Goenka University placements. The top recruiters were EY, KPMG, PWC, Protiviti and many others participated during the placement drive.

At GD Goenka University , the Corporate Resource Center (CRC) offers skill development programs. These programmes make students ready for the professional world. The center provides 100% placement assistance to students. The institute has a strong relationship with leading companies to provide employment to students in and outside India. Trainings are conducted for successful placements such as mock interviews, pre placement briefings and personality development programmes. The CRC has a one student, one job policy to make sure every student has a job when they graduate.
Refer to the CRC activities listed below:
1. Student Centric Active Learning Workshop
4. Resume building workshop

library.description:
GDGU Library and Information Centre consists a Reference Section, Circulation Section, Audio-visual Section, Periodical Section, Book Bank and Digital Library. It has automated all its library activities through Library Software to provide the effective and wide range of academic resources such as books, journals, online databases, DVDs, CD-ROMs, e-journals and other useful materials.
Library has Institutional Memberships of DELNET, Shodhganga (INFLIBNET) and many more. The library is subscribing more than 29450 e-journals and magazines National and International in full-text through the online databases especially for the academic and research needs of the GDGU academic community.

reviews.review_heading: I am very glad to take admission in such a good university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the building is well-built and of high-quality labs. Classrooms are digital. Library is very well furnished, and all books are available here. The quality of hostel is like a 5 star hostel, and medical facilities are also available. Food quality at hostel is very excellent.

reviews.review_heading: GD Goenka University is a good private college recognized by UGC, BCI, ICAR, PCI, and NAAC.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, pharmaceutical labs, library, CIL labs, machine room, gym, cafeteria, swimming pool, football ground, archery room, badminton rooms, table tennis court, lawn tennis court, pool room, steam and spa rooms are all available. The quality of the food is amazing. There is centralized AC, a study room, a common room, a fridge, Wi-Fi, a smart TV, and hygienic washrooms in every room. Medical facilities are available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with it. Students must visit the university.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available for students like a peaceful library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The infrastructure is very attractive and unique from other universities. The hostel is similar to the classroom building. It has all facilities in the hostel like Wi-Fi, mess food, and all these things are very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members were good. The library was well-maintained, and medical facilities were also good. Sports facilities were also good. You could participate in any co-curricular activities, as all were conducted by the university. The university environment was good for improving your personal growth.

reviews.review_heading: The facility is good, the environment, and facilities are good. All is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library are good. Food is mostly North Indian, somewhat nice, and desserts are really tasty. All facilities are excellent. Wi-Fi provides personal access, and daily cleaning of rooms and washrooms, It provides good service in a hostel-like, home-environment.

reviews.review_heading: Good value for money and good environment.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good on our campus. There's a stationary, a cafe, a supermarket, and a canteen. Also, each and every classroom has AC and a projector. The hostel is good, with mess food being far better than many other hostel foods. Every hostel room also has a study room for students to study.

reviews.review_heading: Taking admission in GD should know all the information that is given in this article.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, libraries, and other areas are fully functional. We have good infrastructure. The food is amazing at the college. We have different options for food. The hostel people also have snacks and varieties to have so they don't feel sick.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to see your future, you can join GD Goenka.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my course is the best, I feel, because in a proper way they have planned it, and from the second year, they are giving us the opportunity to try for an internship. The classroom is in the proper manner, and there are two labs in my university. If we talk about the hostel, they are also in a proper way.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for B.Tech or any other course. It is just like other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure  is really good. There is a fully AC campus. Library, labs, and classrooms are well-maintained with Wi-Fi. There are refreshment areas like Domino's, Nescafe, CCD, Fuel Zap, Nirulas, and college canteens on the campus. Hostel is like a 4-star hotel with all facilities like fully AC, swimming pool, gym, shooting range, and many more. But hostel is quite expensive 2.5 lakhs for 4 sharing rooms and 1.5 lakhs for 8 sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college for the degree.
reviews.review_text: So the infrastructure of my college was so good; there were hostel facilities available for both girls and boys, and it was the best in the Delhi NCR. The mess was so good and had facilities for the gym and ground sports. Overall, it was very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by United World Institute of Design, GD Goenka UniversityReviewed on 2 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and management of this college.
reviews.review_text: UID has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students. All kinds of modern facilities were available for the students interactive learning. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc. Facilities were given to the students. Mess and canteen food were good to eat. All the facilities are properly managed by the college management.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities include multiple sports fields, indoor sports facilities, the availability of coaching, auditoriums, amphitheaters, air-conditioned lecture halls and well-stocked libraries. The campus is huge and has many popular eateries and spots to hang out with your friends.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Each block of the university has its own air-conditioned spacious library with a good collection of books. The classrooms are also air conditioned. There are clean washrooms, good sports facilities, hygienic canteen and an overall green campus. The quality of food available in the mess as well as canteen is also satisfactory. The infrastructure and facilities that the university provides is worth the feels charge by them.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GD Goenka University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure provided by our college are so good that we have a very big classroom with good Wi-Fi. Our hostel also has good food for students and no complaints have been reported by the students based on the quality of our food. Our hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Happy to have this college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms in GD Goenka university are very much good and the infrastructure is very nice, all the classes have proper light, fans, AC rooms and all class have one or two projectors. Wi-Fi is available all the time and labs are also working and in good condition and students can access them any time whenever they want to use. There are two libraries in our college and every students can access both of them. And there is a huge collection of books. In hostel every rooms have AC, fridge, oven ...

data.description: Yes, GD Goenka University provides its students with hostel accommodations. Boys' and girls' hostels are available separately at the institution. The rooms are roomy, cosy, and completely air-conditioned. For the students' protection, the hostels offer top-notch security systems. The hostel offers four different types of accommodations: bunk beds, double-sharing, triple-sharing, and four-sharing.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about GD Goenka University

likes.text: Companies like IBM, Essar Group, Indusland Bank, HDFC, Marriot International, ITC, Wizcraft, WNS, Proviti, Paytm, etc., have been some of the prominent recruiters.
The university also teaches students how to get placements in a good company which is very helpful for the students.

The hostel mess also provides good food and is affordable in every way.

college_info.intro:
Sanjay Ghodawat University Kolhapur has a total of 10 schools of study, including Mgmt, Eng, Design, Media, Social Science, & others. The university has a wide range of courses at the UG & PG levels across diff. streams. MBA, BBA, & BTech are among the most popular programmes available at the university.
Sanjay Ghodawat University offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Aeronautical Eng, Civil Eng, Electronics & Communication Eng, Computer Science & Eng, & AI & ML.
The MBA programme offered by the SGU Kolhapur is a 2-year course. It is offered in specialisations, including IB, Financial, HR, Marketing, & Operation & Supply Chain. Below are the Sanjay Ghodawat University's popular programmes:

The university gave its students an average annual package of Rs 3.25 lakh in 2022; the lowest package was Rs 2.5 lakh. In the same year, MBA candidates received offers of a median package worth INR 3.80 lakh annually on average. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanjay Ghodawat University offers more than 50 courses across seven streams at UG, PG and PhD levels. Under the UG programme, it offers BTech, BSc, BCom, BA, BBA and BCA. At the PG level, the university provides MBA, MTech, MCA, MCom, MSc and MA. Sanjay Ghodawat University Maharashtra also offers PhD programmes in streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, Science and Arts. Below mentioned are Sanjay Ghodawat University courses and Sanjay Ghodawat University fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sanjay Ghodawat University has seat reservations for BSc courses. Additionally, admission seats for Sanjay Ghodawat University for BSc students of the reserved category shall be according to the State Government policy of Maharashtra. Out of the approved total intake capacity,  70% of the seats shall be available for students domiciled in the state of Maharashtra, and 30% of the seats shall be available for all-India candidates.
faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University follows seat reservation policies for BSc courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates are eligible to apply for M.Tech at Sanjay Ghodawat University even if they don't have a GATE score. They should still qualify for any national-level or state-level entrance exam conducted by a valid authority. The university also accepts PERA CET scores for admission to MTech.
faqs.question: Can I apply for M.Tech at Sanjay Ghodawat University without GATE score?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, students who are in Class 12 or are awaiting for their Class 12 results can certainly apply for the MAH BBA CET exam. The basic eligibility crtieria for appearing for the MAH BBA CET exam is as follows:Candidates must have studied Class 12 from a recognised boardCandidates should have secured at least 50% aggregate or equivalent CGPA in Class 12Candidates appearing for the Class 12 examination or awaiting results are also eligible to appear for the MAH BBA CET exam.
faqs.question: Can I apply for MAH BBA CET exam without the result of Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sanjay Ghodawat University (SGU) accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its BE/BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends.CourseJEE Main Cutoff 2023BE (Computer Engineering)33106 - 74070BE (Electrical Engineering)40228 - 82071BE (Electronics and Communication Engineering)40941 - 83717BE (Mechanical Engineering)35823 - 79002BE (Civil Engineering)37131 - 80836BE (Information Technology)41107 - 83419BE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)42918 - 86814BE (Data Science)44098 - 88815BE (Biomedical Engineering)45831 - 92910 Candidates must also meet the following eligibility criteria to apply for admission to BE/BTech courses at SGU:Candidates must have passed the 10+2 examination from a recognised board with a minimum of 50% marks in Physics,  Chemistry,  and Mathematics.Candidates must have a valid JEE Main score.Candidates must be below the age of 22 years as on 31st December of the year of admission.Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for admission based on their JEE Main score and performance in the SGU Entrance Test (SET). The SET is conducted by SGU for admission to its BE/BTech courses.

review_content.General: Good facilities are available for our course and world-class infrastructure is built. The campus is very attractive and clean. Wi-Fi is available on the campus for free. Laboratories are well-equipped. Big classrooms are available. There is a big library also present. In the hostel, there are 4 students in one room and two fans are available in each room. Hostel mess food quality is not so good compared to the price they charge for one month which is Rs 3,500 for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports ground is so big and lots of games and competitions are held.

overview_faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: After receiving duly signed admission cancellation request letter from the candidate as per schedule published by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, the University shall cancel the admission immediately. The refund of fees on or before cut-off date of admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, shall be made within two days i.e. total fee minus the processing charges of Rs.1,000/-, or refund rule shall be as per the guidelines of the appropriate authorities or the State Government, as the case may be. If the admission is cancelled after the cut-off date of the admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, there shall be no refund except the Security Deposit and Caution Money Deposit.Thanks

review_summary.college_name: Sanjay Ghodawat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has great learning environment with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: A good percentage is required, but a student with good skills is more important in my opinion. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Students having good knowledge of problem-solving can pass the interviews. There are many roles offered, but it's up to us what we prefer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good and beautiful. The hostel is clean and great. Infrastructure consists of a lake, trees, gardens, statues, and much more. There is free Wi-Fi, clean labs, and larger classrooms. The library consists of different types of books. It has been a great experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Inside Sanjay Ghodawat University - SGU.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our course is about 25%. The highest package offered is 6 LPA. The average package is 2 LPA. The lowest package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Lupin, etc. About 20% of students get internships from our course in Reddy's Laboratories and Lupin. Top role offered is junior pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are available for our course and world-class infrastructure is built. The campus is very attractive and clean. Wi-Fi is available on the campus for free. Laboratories are well-equipped. Big classrooms are available. There is a big library also present. In the hostel, there are 4 students in one room and two fans are available in each room. Hostel mess food quality is not so good compared to the price they charge for one month which is Rs 3,500 for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports ground is so big and lots of games and competitions are held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members but they should change the teaching manner.

content.Placements: A little smaller amount of students get placements. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 1.2 LPA. There are very less companies that come to college for campus selection and choose the students wisely by taking few tests and not taking them only through their marks.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very good and tidy. They clean the college regularly. No one can enter without an ID card the keepers of the college. The hostel is supportive. They keep supporting students when they need their help and give them the necessary essential.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my college is about up to 84%, approximately and the average package is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys and there are other companies like Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, and other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are available in the hostel like well-maintained rooms, purified water, good-ventilated rooms, and hot water facilities. Wi-Fi facility is also available and also there are mess and canteen facilities on campus. Medical facilities, indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Loved the campus life and colleagues.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in my course or program is not clearly specified. Some information is there about placements that approximately 88% of students got internships. Top requirement companies are Microsoft, Google, Infosys, Tata, Wipro, and many more. It is not clearly specified.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for my department are normally good with well-equipped classrooms featuring modern equipment, smart labs, and a well-stocked library. The quality of facilities of the hostel is good. There is a mess hall that provides good food.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanjay Ghodawat University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Sanjay Ghodawat University (SGU) offers more than 60 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes in Technology, Architecture, Commerce & Management, Science, Computer Science & Applications, Liberal Arts, and Pharmaceutical Sciences. SGU accepts the applications in the online mode. Admission to various courses at the university is merit-based or entrance exam-based.

Apart from these courses, the university also provides financial support to students basis their academic merit and entrance exam scores. Also, SGU provides several job opportunities to students across various courses through campus placement drives where recruiters like Amazon, ICICI Bank, Infosys, and Wipro participate.

Merit in the last qualifying examination is the basic eligibility for various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes offered at Sanjay Ghodawat University. However, admission to these courses is based on the scores obtained by the candidates in national, state, or university-level entrance exams. The table below lists various courses offered at SGU along with their application status, eligibility, and fee details:
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
JEE/ MHTCET/PERA CET
Class 12 with PCM/ Diploma
NATA/ JEE Main Paper II
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate
CAT/MAT/XAT/ GMAT/ATMA/CMAT/ PERA CET
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
NEET/MHTCET
BE/ BTech with 45% aggregate
GATE/ PERA CET
BCA or equivalent degree with 50% aggregate
MAH-MCA-CET
Bachelor's degree from a recognised university
Master's degree

The admission procedure for Sanjay Ghodawat University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, application, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedSanjay Ghodawat University admissions process:
Step 1: Sanjay Ghodawat University Application Process 2025

Sanjay Ghodawat University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Sanjay Ghodawat University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the UG and PG courses at Sanjay Ghodawat University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as SGUPET for the selection of respective courses.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: Sanjay Ghodawat University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered to Engineering students during Sanjay Ghodawat University placements 2025 stood at INR 36 LPA and INR 3.20 LPA, respectively. Further, the highest and average package offered to Management students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 4.25 LPA, respectively. The highest and average package offered to the Pharmacy batch 2025 stood at INR 4.6 LPA and INR 3 LPA, respectively.

Earlier, the 2024 placements at Sanjay Ghodawat University have successfully concluded with 212 students placed. In addition to this, the NIRF report 2024 has also been released. As per the report, the median package offered to the BTech and MTech students during the 2023 drive stood at INR 3.60 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. For MBA courses, the 2023 median package stood at INR 4 LPA.

The average package is like 4LPA in Sanjay Ghodawat University for MBA. The lowest package is 2lpa in Sanjay Ghodawat University for MBA. So the placement is descent. If you grab placement and work 2-3 years and gain skills you can improve package.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BSc course from Sanjay Ghodawat University?
faqs.answer: Today, a government job is preferable to a private job. Government job aspirants generally take BSc courses to achieve success in their respective fields. Upon completion of the BSc course from Sanjay Godawat University, candidates can seek different government job options in various fields. Following are some popular choices: - Civil Service, State Civil Service, Banking Sector, SSC Exam, Railways, Teaching Jobs, Defense Service, Public Service Undertaking, Translators, Interpreters, etc.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered at Sanjay Ghodawat University?
faqs.answer: The median package offered to the 2023 passing-out BTech and MTech students was INR 3.60 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. For the MBA batch, the median package stood at INR 4 LPA. Take a look at the table below to know the Sanjay Ghodawat University median package 2023: Course Median Package (2023) BTech INR 3.60 LPA MTech INR 4 LPA MBA INR 4 LPA NOTE: The above salary details are gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University refund fees?
faqs.answer: After receiving duly signed admission cancellation request letter from the candidate as per schedule published by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, the University shall cancel the admission immediately. The refund of fees on or before cut-off date of admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, shall be made within two days i.e. total fee minus the processing charges of Rs.1,000/-, or refund rule shall be as per the guidelines of the appropriate authorities or the State Government, as the case may be. If the admission is cancelled after the cut-off date of the admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, there shall be no refund except the Security Deposit and Caution Money Deposit. Thanks

faqs.question: Does SGU offer better placements than KIT's IMER?
faqs.answer: Yes, SGU offer better placements than KIT's IMER. Placement rates at SGU are reportedly above 90% for a several of programmes, including the MBA and B.Tech. Depending on the programme and area of expertise, the average package ranges from INR 3.10 LPA to 5.50 LPA. Their success is attributed to their strong industry connections and specialised placement cell. Over 80% of students who applied to KIT's IMER were placed. A package typically costs between INR 3 and 4 LPA. In general, KIT's IMER fees are less than those at SGU.The market demand may favour some specialisations within a programme over others in terms of placement opportunities. It is advisable to compare information from the most recent reports for both universities, as placement data can vary from year to year.

faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sanjay Ghodawat University has a good placement history. Around 85% of students got placed at reputable companies like Tata Motors, L&T, and TCS. The university gave its students an average annual package of Rs 3.25 lakh in 2022; the lowest package was Rs 2.5 lakh. In the same year, MBA candidates received offers of a median package worth INR 3.80 lakh annually on average. In contrast to the previous year, there was a slight decrease in the number of students placed in 2023—roughly 35% fewer students were chosen. Furthermore, there were around 8% fewer organizations visiting for placements.

average_package.complete_content: The Sanjay Ghodawat University average package details have not been released. However, the median salary for UG and PH courses is available in the NIRF report 2024. As per the report, the median package offered to the MBA 2023 passing out batch was INR 4 LPA. For BTech and MTech courses, the median package stood at INR 3.60 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively.

description: Sanjay Ghodawat University cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Sanjay Ghodawat University JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Sanjay Ghodawat University cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 256879 and 384053 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 256879, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 245367.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 256879.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Sanjay Ghodawat University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 47.8 and 78.43, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 78.43. Sanjay Ghodawat University MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 78.43. hostel_campus.college_name: Sanjay Ghodawat University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has great learning environment with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good and beautiful. The hostel is clean and great. Infrastructure consists of a lake, trees, gardens, statues, and much more. There is free Wi-Fi, clean labs, and larger classrooms. The library consists of different types of books. It has been a great experience.

reviews.review_heading: Inside Sanjay Ghodawat University - SGU.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available for our course and world-class infrastructure is built. The campus is very attractive and clean. Wi-Fi is available on the campus for free. Laboratories are well-equipped. Big classrooms are available. There is a big library also present. In the hostel, there are 4 students in one room and two fans are available in each room. Hostel mess food quality is not so good compared to the price they charge for one month which is Rs 3,500 for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Me...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members but they should change the teaching manner.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good and tidy. They clean the college regularly. No one can enter without an ID card the keepers of the college. The hostel is supportive. They keep supporting students when they need their help and give them the necessary essential.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are available in the hostel like well-maintained rooms, purified water, good-ventilated rooms, and hot water facilities. Wi-Fi facility is also available and also there are mess and canteen facilities on campus. Medical facilities, indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Loved the campus life and colleagues.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for my department are normally good with well-equipped classrooms featuring modern equipment, smart labs, and a well-stocked library. The quality of facilities of the hostel is good. There is a mess hall that provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Good environmental conditions and suitable situations.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my CSE program is excellent, with well-equipped classrooms and a well-stocked library offering both physical and digital resources. Hostel facilities are equally impressive, providing comfortable, well-ventilated rooms, clean common areas, a dedicated study space, and a decent mess that serves a variety of nutritious meals. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice environment and greenery
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my CSE program is excellent, with well-equipped classrooms and a well-stocked library offering both physical and digital resources. Hostel facilities are equally impressive, providing comfortable, well-ventilated rooms, clean common areas, a dedicated study space, and a decent mess that serves a variety of nutritious meals.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is good, with well-equipped classrooms featuring modern projectors and smart boards, a well-stocked library, water pressure, and a mess hall that could improve. We also have a variety of food and there is a food court.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the management, but the infrastructure and facilities worth the admission fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Well-maintained classrooms, labs, and the library are the major attractions of our college. Hostel facilities are also provided by our university. Hostels are neat, clean, and tidy. The mess for hostel students is available both inside and outside the college. Annual sports are also organized in our university as part of extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities by Sanjay Ghodawat University, Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides world-class infrastructure and is well-maintained. Our college provides big classrooms with projectors. Wi-Fi is available and labs are fully equipped. We have big library with lots of books. Hostel rooms are well-maintained but 4 students in one room feels congested. We have to pay Rs. 57,000 per year for hostel. The quality of food is decent not so good. There is medical inside the campus. Big cricket ground is available for playing.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Sanjay Ghodawat University. A journey of growth and learning.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi. In colleges on almost all floors, there are 3/4 connections per floor. Daily it conducts at least 2/3 games practice. Classrooms are properly ventilated and clean. The college is properly clean and attractive. The college food court is huge. It provides all things. There is a medical and ambulance also for any emergency.

reviews.review_heading: As a student of Sanjay Ghodawat University, I'm absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our department are very good but not excellent because hostel can't provide Wi-Fi. Food facility is very poor. In terms of medical facilities its very good and this college gives the highest priorities to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good Accommodation and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my program is excellent, with well-equipped labs featuring modern technology, spacious classrooms that facilitate interactive learning, and a well-stocked library with a comprehensive collection of relevant research materials and more.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and accommodation.
reviews.review_text: Overall, infrastructure for my course and hostel is good. Facilties available for course are good. There are labs and computers. The quality of facilities in my hostel and mess is good. There are medical, sports and games facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanjay Ghodawat University.
reviews.review_text: About our college infrastructure, there are lots of facilities available like Wi-Fi available is available at hostel's every floor.

Sanjay Ghodawat University awards various scholarships to the deserving and needfull BCom students. The scholarships are provided to the students on the basis of their merit and scores achieved in Class 12. Moreover, the university also offers a loyalty scholarship to the students who have completed their Class 12 from Sanjay Ghodawat institutions. Candidates can also get minority scholarships through NSP.
Hi.

B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at Sanjay Ghodawat University is a 4 years course at the UG level. The course offers admission to 60 students. The total tuition fee for Sanjay Ghodawat University B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning is INR 5.30 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a hostel fee of amount INR 2.28 Lacs that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. So, total fees is Rs 7.58 Lakh.
Thanks

reviews_list.review_title: Fashion-focused learning with strong placements and events.

review_content.Placements: I am in 2nd year of my course B.Des 4-year degree program. I have only been listening to my seniors and teachers, who have almost all their students placed this year. Top roles offered include fashion stylist, designer assistant, merchandiser, and even visual branding associate roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: I want to say IIFD is the best place to start your journey. The campus is quite modern and full of all the needed amenities. Our department has dedicated fashion labs, pattern-making studios, illustration rooms, and full Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. The hostel facilities are clean, secure, and comfortable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Designing - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great fashion exposure and placement opportunities!

review_content.Placements: The college offers an excellent learning atmosphere with experienced teachers and updated labs that make every day an exciting journey in fashion education. From what I have seen and based on recent placement results, 97 to 99% of students got placed in fashion design degree courses. I saw that the highest package is 47 LPA and the average package is 11 LPA. Some students even got international placements and reputed fashion house offers, which is really motivating.
review_content.Infrastructure: All things are good in our college. Our fashion design department at IIFD Kolkata is very well. Classrooms are modern with good projectors and ACs. Wi-Fi is available which is most necessary in today's education. The fashion studios have proper things like mannequins, draping tools, sewing machines, and mood board areas.
