college_info.college_name: Pearl Academy New Friends Colony Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, in addition to semester-wise tuition, students enroling in the Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony MBA programme are required to pay a one-time fee of INR 82,000, which typically covers registration, alumni, and security charges. This fee is separate from the recurring semester fees and is part of the total programme cost.

All applicants of Pearl Academy in all UG and PG programmes for the Academic Year 2025 are eligible for the Scholarship. Applicants are not required to apply for the Scholarship separately. Applicants will be offered the Scholarship based on their performance in the Pearl Entrance Exam, which includes a Written Exam (GPT & DAT) and a Personal Interview. Applicants for Fashion and Design programmes are also required to showcase their portfolio, which serves as a platform for evaluating their technical and conceptual proficiency.

Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony MBA scholarships 2025 include the Sherryl Kintu Scholarship, offering 100% tuition fee coverage (excluding registration, alumni, and security fees) for students with a family income below INR 8 LPA, and a Merit-Based Scholarship awarded based on the candidate's performance in the Pearl Entrance Exam.

Pearl Academy, New Friends Colony offers MBA course for a duration of two year in a full-time mode. The tuition for MBA course ranges between INR 10.9 Lacs - INR 15.3 lakh. Apart from this, candidates also have to pay for one-time charges, which includes  Alumni Fee, Registration Fees and Security Deposit (Refundable). This information is sourced from unofficial sources. Candidates are advised to visit the official website to know more about Pearl Academy MBA fee.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sacred Heart College - SHC a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sacred Heart College - SHC is a well-known institution for M.Sc, M.Com, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, BBA, BCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Sacred Heart College - SHC has a rating of 4.35 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.58 on Campus Life, 4.1 on Placements, 4.31 on Faculty and 4.28 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sacred Heart College - SHC Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Economics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I have a good experience at SH Thevara.

content.Placements: There are around 75–80% placements at SH. Companies like Deloitte, KPMG, etc., recruit regularly. The average package is 4–4.5 LPA, with the highest reaching 6–7 LPA. There is a strong placement cell support at the college. More than 65% of students receive internships during their 2nd year.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-maintained and has modern classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The library has all kinds of reading material required for all subjects. Hostel accommodation is clean, but the rent is a bit high. There is a good canteen with decent food, and the college promotes sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in English - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sacred Heart College - SHC.

content.Placements: There is currently a batch of 15 students in my course. I do not understand this since the seating list came out. There were many students on the waiting list. The strength of the class is weak this year, but our seniors’ classes seem stronger. It is an autonomous college. The east campus, where I study, is the pricier side of the institution, but even so, B.A. English is the least expensive course on that campus. There are many opportunities provided.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are fine but overpriced, and the current warden is not very good. I recommend staying at a private hostel or PG rather than the college hostel. Food is not satisfactory. The college infrastructure is great, but it is currently undergoing construction.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Com. Course.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities here are excellent, with about 92% of students receiving job offers. The top recruiting companies for our college include L&T, Tata Steel, and Tata Motors. The highest salary offered was 21 LPA, the lowest was 11 LPA, and the average salary was 19 LPA. The main roles offered are HR Manager and Management Consultant. Most students secure internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities here include free Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, medical facilities, a library, separate rooms for both boys and girls, a computer lab, cafeterias, restaurants, etc. Hotels are available, and the campus is clean. The food at the hotel is excellent. Students are offered sports and games opportunities, as well as yoga training.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sacred Heart College - SHC.

content.Placements: Our college has much higher placements for students of this course. The highest package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest package offered in this course is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit the college to hire students in this course. The percentage of students who get internships in my college is 75 percent.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in my course. The infrastructure of this college is so good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are available in my course. The quality of food in my college canteen is so good. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are not present here.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for M.Com.

content.Placements: Our college currently provides 80% placement opportunities and makes recruitment easy. The placement rate is better than that of any other college in India. The minimum package for our batch is 4 LPA, which is less than the maximum package of 12 LPA for this course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities of our college are excellent. Since there is no noise on the campus, it is a peaceful place to sit and study due to the careful attention of the authorities to the surrounding environment. The institution provides us with all the facilities, which include Wi-Fi, labs, and access to online and offline libraries. Also, there is a library in the garden where we can sit and study.

paragraphs: Sacred Heart College - SHC admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Sacred Heart College - SHC considers scores in CBSE 12th and Kerala 12th for admission to specific courses.Sacred Heart College - SHCoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 14,520 - 2,87,775. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 13,460 - 90,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

nirf.description:
Over the years, Sacred Heart College - SHC has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the Sacred Heart College - SHC's rankings in 'Colleges' category have displayed an increasing trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, Sacred Heart College - SHC climbed 4 ranks to #44 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Sacred Heart College - SHC has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Sacred Heart College - SHC indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Sacred Heart College - SHC's rank is #25, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Sacred Heart College - SHC's rank is #24, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Sacred Heart College - SHC's rank is #33, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this is a good college for the M.Com course in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in my course were great. The classroom, library, lab, and Wi-Fi are all available. Both a large gym and an air-conditioned library are available. In my hostel, the facilities and quality were too close. Hostels for girls and boys are not the same. Medical facilities are accessible. In my course, games and sports are fantastic.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for B.A. in economics course.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were very comfortable, with well-appointed rooms and common bathrooms. Wi-Fi and electricity were available 24 hours. Mess had a vegetarian and vegan menu, with plenty of South Indian and North Indian dishes to choose from. There was also a clinic open from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, weekdays.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for B.A. In the English Course.
reviews.review_text: As a recognised and reputable institution. Our college has an excellent programme for our course. Modern facilities are provided to improve student learning. The college provides labs equipped with practical knowledge, a library, Wi-Fi, a canteen, a hostel, sports, and various other facilities that cater to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for the MBA course is at the lowest cost.
reviews.review_text: Our college is admirably equipped, providing students with well-equipped laboratories, spacious classrooms, and advanced libraries. The facilities of the hotel meet satisfactory standards, providing quality food amidst all the hustle and bustle. Medical services are readily available on campus, while sports and leisure activities promote a well-rounded student experience.

reviews.review_heading: Students are friends and like family here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our campus and the course are excellent. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and faculty members all are unlimited. The hostel mess and canteen provide healthy food. The college gives medical support. Sports and extracurricular activities are conducted for all students to encourage and entertain them.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of Sacred Heart College - academics, campus life, and beyond that.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was top. Every year new structures and styles were adopted. Facilities available for students were one of the main attractions of our college. Classrooms were large and some of the new departments were air-conditioned with Wi-Fi facilities. Computer labs were good with proper Wi-Fi facilities and air-conditioner. The library contains a huge collection of books and journals with many antique collections. The hostel facilities were not so good for girls with certa...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with facilities, good placements, other crews, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at this college are good. The usage of Wi-Fi, labs, and library helps us in every department. We have UG and PG lab with many facilities, and research work for the final project is helpful from our labs. Canteen is good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: A best college students probably can find in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available for study purposes. We can use labs with the permission of our concerned head of department and teachers. The canteen serves good food compared to others. It has a clean and neat place. Sports teams are working and there are champions in almost all sports in our college. There is a highly efficient library and online facility in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Sacred heart through the eyes of a heartian: Where art meets academics.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the college through which we can login into and use as we wish. It is easy to use. It has a good speed. Our classrooms are nice. It doesn't get much sunlight compared to other UG classes. The library has a vast selection of books about our subjects as well as others. We do have good fiction books. The library staff is very friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Great college for admission.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure have improved. They supply classrooms, labs, a library, Wi-Fi, and other departments inside the college, and excellent guidance from educators. The hostel has food facilities, hosts games and sports, has medical services, and regularly hosts cultural events.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sacred Heart College - SHC

likes.text: The companies that have frequently visited the college for recruitment are Goldman Sachs, Mckinsey, Wipro, Federal Bank, Larsen and Toubro, Hedge Financing, etc.
The college not only provides placement support but it also tries to provide internship opportunities to as many students as possible.

college_info.intro:
SRM Easwari Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes at the UG and PG levels. The flagship programmes offered by the SRMEEC Chennai are mainly BTech and MTech. Each course has different eligibility criteria. SRM EEC admissions for various courses are merit-based and entrance-based.
The college offers respective courses for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years with a total tuition fee ranging from INR 70K to INR 2 Lakh. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of Class 12 qualification with 45% aggregate for UG-level courses. For PG-level courses, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. The curriculum of BTech and MTech is designed by the expert faculty as per the affiliating body standards.
For more information about SRM Easwari Engineering College, check out the video below:

admission_overview.college_name: SRMEEC Chennai Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Admission Process, Dates

admission_process.title: SRM Easwari Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SRM Easwari Engineering College admission 2025 isopen. The institute is affiliated withAnna Universityand offers UG and PG-level courses in the field of Engineering and Management such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc.Easwari Engineering Collegeoffers direct admission to BTech and seats are allocated to candidates through TNEA Counselling. For admission to MTech, a valid GATE/ CEETA score is required. However,for MBA and MCA courses, candidates must qualify for TANCET. The final seat allotment is done through counselling process conducted by the respective examination bodies. Read on the article to know more about SRM Easwari Engineering College admission in detail.

Candidates seeking for admission to UG & PG courses at the institute must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective courses. Admissions are both entrance and merit-based. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for the SRM Easwari Engineering College course admissions 2025:
Class 12 with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry as main subjects from a recognised board
UG degree in any discipline either from Anna University or equivalent
UG degree in any discipline either from Anna University or equivalent
UG degree in any discipline either from Anna University or equivalent

SRM Easwari Engineering College admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The admission process includes filling the application form, appearing for the exam and registering for the counselling process. The detailed steps around theSRM Easwari Engineering College admission processare as follows:
STEP 1: Application Process

To apply for admission to UG & PG courses at SRM Easwari Engineering College, candidates must register on the official website of the respective entrance exam/ counselling bodies as per the course choice. For BTech, candidates must register for TNEA Counselling. For admission to MTech, students are required to register either for GATE or CEETA. However, MBA and MCA admissions begin with TANCET registrations.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

As per the admission process, direct admission is offered to BTech aspirants based on their past academic records. They only have to register for TNEA Counselling process. However, admission to MTech, MBA and MCA courses is entirely entrance-based. Candidates must qualify for exams such asGATE, CEET & TANCETfor their respective courses.
STEP 3: Counselling Process

Candidates who qualify all the selection rounds must register for counselling process for their respective courses. The final seat allotment will be done based on the participation of the students in the counselling rounds.

Recently, the institute ranked #101-150 in the NIRF 2025 under the Engineering category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. nirf.description:
SRM Easwari Engineering College has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SRM Easwari Engineering College indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, SRM Easwari Engineering College climbed 50 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: The college is feature technology enabled learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is good and well maintained. The department has classrooms with projectors, well equipped computer laboratories, and campus wide Wi-Fi connectivity. The central library has a wide collection of textbook reference books.

reviews.review_heading: A useful and critical review of Easwari Engineering College by assessing all the major factors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty decent in our college. I am from the CSE department, so I can see that all the systems in the labs are clearly working, and I have not heard any complaints from other students regarding infrastructure. As a day scholar, I do not have personal experience with a hostel environment, but my friends from the hostel are satisfied with the hostel provisions and safety.

reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms with projector and sometimes fans, light, and windows will be broken labs-microcontroller, instrumentation. Quality of food and hostel is average. In sports, you will be given chances to participate in other college sports events if you are a sports person.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study in the city.
reviews.review_text: The college offers many facilities. It includes Wi-Fi. Water is available on every floor of the campus. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained. The hostel is also well-maintained and cleaned daily for cleanliness. The quality of food in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: The campus facilities meet the necessary academic needs.
reviews.review_text: The department is equipped with basic academic infrastructure. Laboratories are available and are gradually being upgraded as the department is relatively new. The quality of the food in the canteen is good and the hygiene is good. The institution encourages students to take part in extracurricular and curricular activities too.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good colleges in Chennai with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available. We have multiple computer labs, one robotics lab, and many other lab facilities in Easwari Engineering College. Hostels are provided with both A/C and non-A/C options. The canteen has two floors, and we also have two grounds for outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and growing opportunities. Supportive faculty and positive campus experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the Biotechnology department is well-developed and constantly improving. The department has well-developed and well-equipped laboratories for microbiology, cell biology, etc. Classrooms are spacious and have well-facilitated Wi-Fi all over the campus. The hostel's facilities are quite good and comfortable. Rooms are clean and maintained regularly, and basics like Wi-Fi, laundry, and study areas are available. The mess food is decent, with both veg and non-vegetarian option...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college with a good learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The canteen offers a better variety with reasonable prices, there is a fixed menu, and the quality is quite consistent. Sports and games are provided with excellent infrastructure, equipment availability is decent, and overall supportive. Medical facilities are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements for students.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi throughout the campus, high-quality labs, a well-managed library, normal quality food with vending machines, and a good management system. Need to improve the food quality and nutritional value of the food. Infrastructure is good and needs to build lifts in some hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Beyond the books- my honest take on SRM Easwari's placement and vibe.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is fantastic. A major plus is that our department labs are a true highlight. They are equipped with modern tools and tech that support genuine hands-on learning. Classrooms are spacious. The campus is fully connected with Wi-Fi, which is essential for projects. For those in the hostel, the experience is highly comfortable. Rooms are clean and well-maintained. The mess is hygienic. They offer a decent food variety. We have good sports facilities. The whole campus is supp...

reviews.review_heading: SRM Easwari Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good in our college, and the infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a large, comfortable library are very good. The quality of the food in our canteen is normal, and for sports, there is a separate ground for training and practicing.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is really good overall. Overall, highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. All Building are provided with elevator. We have so many facilities here. Many labs and libraries to work with. We are provided with high-quality teachers, wifis, and resources. As far as food goes, our college canteen is in high demand. We have canteens all around campus for easy access. We have ambulances on standby and pharmacies inside our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college, SRM Easwari, is well reputed and good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college offers many facilities. It includes Wi-Fi. Water available on every floor of the campus. The classrooms are clean and well maintained. The hostel is also well maintained and cleaned daily for cleanliness. The quality of food in the hostel is good and to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM Easwari Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: SRM Easwari Engineering College provides good overall infrastructure with Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, a well-stocked library, hostels with basic amenities, a hygienic mess/canteen, on-campus medical care, and excellent sports facilities, though hostel food quality gets mixed reviews.

reviews.review_heading: It's really good in studies and placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good in our college, and the infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a large, comfortable library are so good. The facilities in our hostel have good vibes, and the quality of the food in our canteen is very super, and the medical facilities are good and have top doctors in our college. For sports and games, having a separate ground for training.

data.description: At SRM Easwari Engineering college, mess facilities are provided along with hostel facilities. Students do not have to pay extra fee for mess. Mess has different menu for each day of  week. Mess food quality is also good. There are many canteens and cafeteria also inside the campus, so don't worry about food .

likes.text: Top companies like TCS, Wipro, Zoho, Honeywell, Johnson controls, VVDN and many more came for our recruitment.
Training in aptitude, technical skills and interview skills are also given which helps the students be at ease during the entire selection process.

paragraphs: For a four-year BTech course at SRM Easwari Engineering College, the tuition fee ranges between INR 1.5 Lacs - INR 2 lakh. This tuition fee is given for all the BTech specialisations offered at SRM Easwari. However, this information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the SRM Easwari Engineering College BTech fee structure. Additionally, those who get selected by the institute are required to apply online for TNEA Counselling along with paying an application of INR 600.

The modes of Easwari Engineering College course admissions 2024 are offline and online. Admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on entrance exam scores and merit. At the undergraduate level, the college offers three to four-year BE/B.Tech courses to students. At the postgraduate level, the Easwari Engineering College offers two-year ME/M.Tech and MBA courses to students. The fee for MBA, M.Tech, and B.Tech is INR 35,000, INR 50,000, and INR 1.5 Lacs - INR 2 Lacs, respectively.

SRM Easwari Engineering College offers UG and PG level programmes such as BTech, MTech, MBA and MCA for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. The college offers respective courses with a total tuition fee ranging from INR 70K to INR 2 Lakh. Apart from this, the fee structure comprises various other components that the candidates can learn about by visiting the official website of SRMEEC Chennai.

SRM Easwari Engineering College offers MBA course for a duration of two years. Those who get selected and get admission to this course must pay a tuition fee of INR 70,000 at the beginning of the commencement of the course. This fee is taken from official sources and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the SRM Easwari Engineering College MBA fee structure. Apart from this, at the time of filling the application form, candidates also have to pay an application fee. Those who seek to appear for TANCET, need to fill a separate application form for the exam. The application fee for TANCET is INR 1,000 for the General and INR 500 for reserved candidates.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.Com from MLSU, Udaipur, and will graduate with the 2025 batch. review_content.Infrastructure: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. review_summary.college_name: MLSU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. B.Ed. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MLSU has a serene campus with decent facilities and a strong academic foundation.

content.Placements: There are some placements at MLSU, but not many. While many students find employment on their own or take government exams, about 25% of students are placed through campus drives. While some people receive good packages, the average is in the lower-to-mid range. The majority of positions offered are in basic corporate roles, banking sales, etc. The platform is provided by the university, but it's not a placement-driven campus, what matters most is your own initiative, connections, and abilities. Instead of depending on the college to provide opportunities for you, it's more important to create your own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the staff, campus, and education.

content.Placements: Not many of my batchmates are left out of placements. It is pretty fine and satisfied with the placements done here. Many students get placements here. As far as I can remember, the students are also very much satisfied with their respective placement offers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very nice. College campus is vast and diverse in area. Hostel facility is also available and very good. Sports are really taken seriously here. Campus is spread over 6-7 acres of land.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They are very qualified, knowledgeable, and experienced. The course curriculum is also very relevant. It makes the students industry-ready. Exams are not that difficult. Teachers are helpful and friendly with the students. Teachers are again very supportive and helpful.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and infrastructure.

paragraphs: Mohanlal Sukhadia University (MLSU) offers seats to eligible students after completion of all the admission stages. Before applying for MLSU admission, students must check the eligibility of the programme first. See below the guide forMLSU admission process:
MLSU Application Process 2026
Interested students can apply online through the MLSU admission portal (mlsuadmissions.sumsraj.com). Students may also submit the applications offline with documents + application fees.
MLSU Selection Process 2026

Admission is offered based on the merit list in the last qualifying exam. Students have to submit the marksheet of the last qualifying exam based on which a merit list is drawn. For courses, such as MBA, the university may consider national-level entrance tests. Students also have to go through counselling process before completing the admission process.
Seat Confirmation

Selected candidates are required to appear for the counselling round for the final confirmation of the admission seat. After the selection, students can apply for the hostel through the 'Hostel Apply' section (if required) on the admission portal and pay the admission fee through net banking/debit/credit card.

TheMLSU fee structureinclude different components. These are admission fees, tuition fee and hostel fee and more. The amount has to be paid through the accepted payment gateway. Some of the components are one-time payments, while the remaining are to be paid annually or semester-wise. Students can check the table below to know about theMLSU Udaipur feesfor some of the popular programmes:

Admission to MLSU courses is given on the basis of merit list followed by counselling.

faqs.question: How to get admission in MLSU?
faqs.answer: MLSU admission process differs based on the course, candidate applying for. Admission to UG courses at MLSU is based on aggregate score obtained in the qualifying exam followed by the counselling. BTech and BArch admissions at MLSU are based on rank secured in theJEE MainandNATAentrance examinations, respectively. The final selection for BTech and BArch is done thoughREAPcounselling.

placement_data.title: MLSU Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: As per MLSU overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3 LPA , INR 4 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.2 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, 606 students were placed during 2022 placements and 100 students opted for higher education . The highest package offered was INR 45 LPA . Further, the average package and lowest package stood at INR 23.10 LPA and INR 1.20 LPA , respectively. The median package offered during MLSU placements 2022 was INR 7 LPA . PI Industries Limited recruited the highest number of students.

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, MLSU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. MLSU's rankings in 'Pharmacy' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, MLSU fell 5 ranks to #64 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'State Public University' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, MLSU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

qs_world.description:
MLSU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MLSU fell 400 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MLSU fell 134 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: MLSU has a serene campus with decent facilities and a strong academic foundation.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious, green, and gives a peaceful vibe to the university. The classrooms are clean but not very modern; some buildings show signs of age. The library is genuinely useful, calm, and perfect for study sessions. Wi-Fi works in some places but is inconsistent everywhere. Computer labs work but aren't high-tech. The space given for sports and outdoor activities is there, and basic but affordable food is available at the canteen. Overall, the infrastructure isn't flashy or modern, bu...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the staff, campus, and education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice. College campus is vast and diverse in area. Hostel facility is also available and very good. Sports are really taken seriously here. Campus is spread over 6-7 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

reviews.review_heading: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was top-notch. All libraries, classrooms, and labs were excellent. That helped in my studies. The quality of facilities the college provided was also good. The food quality, the sports fields, and the medical facilities were all nice.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, but you have to dedicate time to your studies.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Labs are different for MCA and BCA students. Two libraries are here, and there is a mess and medical facilities, but they are not for BCA students. They are for the university, Mohanlal Sukhadia University. So apply if you want to come.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the university, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel experience is average. There is no Wi-Fi or library. 80% of students live in private PG because the university does not have a place to make students stay. The university infrastructure has been developing but not developed since I was admitted.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, check it ones.
reviews.review_text: My college facilities and infrastructure are above average. It has 1 lab, 1 classroom, and 1 library. There is no Wi-Fi, its not bad infrastructure but same time not good. There is no hostel, no canteen, and no medical facilities. But every month sports and games events are organized by students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable course and shows that the BCA program is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: I pursued a BCA in Computer Science from the 024-2026 batch. The infrastructure of the IT department is well-developed. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, including labs and library.

reviews.review_heading: Mohanlal Sukhadia University is overall the best college for every student.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and an excellent environment for students. The food quality is good, and the library offers the best environment on campus. The medical facilities are average, but we have solid sports and games programs.

reviews.review_heading: College with average fee, good quality, availability of labs, library, canteen, and best study.
reviews.review_text: Mohanlal Sukhadia University in Udaipur had a well-established infrastructure with facilities like spacious classrooms, specialized labs, and a large library. Basic amenities like electricity, water, furniture, and TV rooms were available. Girls' hostel had CCTV surveillance. The hostel mess provided hygienic food. Hostels were located within the university campus. The hostel environment was fresh with a big garden. MLSU had a health center with doctors and nursing staff for the university commu...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of lack of infrastructure and placement cell.
reviews.review_text: There are two libraries, with free A.I.R. subscription. Buildings are nicely ventilated however, classrooms don't get clean that often. Wi-Fi services are not available. The canteen is almost non-existent. No sports infrastructure and medical facilities are also questionable.

reviews.review_heading: I felt disappointed because of the placement issues.
reviews.review_text: Law department classrooms are functional and well-maintained with a healthy and clean environment. Facilities include two libraries with chairs and tables and one library is air-conditioned and has cool drinking water facilities. Washrooms are clean and well-maintained. It provides a canteen and other parking facilities. Hostel facilities are provided with a library, good food, clean mess, washrooms, and other areas. It has sports facilities like basketball, volleyball, badminton, cricket, etc. ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri Govind Guru Government CollegeReviewed on 14 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is not outstanding. It has good infrastructure. Faculty members are quite good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent but not outstanding. Classrooms and labs are functional, but average. The library has a massive collection and it is sufficient for basic needs. Sports facilities are available for every sport. The infrastructure is average but sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Degree Science CollegeReviewed on 2 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is actually very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college was very good. The science labs, library, and gym were available in the college and hostel. The quality of food was very good in the hostel. A canteen was also available on the college campus. Medical facilities, games, and sports were provided by the college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mohanlal Sukhadia University

college_info.college_name: IIT Indore: Cutoff, Placement, Fees, Admission 2026, Ranking, Courses

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest rankings, IIT Indore has been ranked #27 under the 'Overall', #12 under the 'Engineering' category, and #24 under the 'Research Institutions' category.

The QS Rankings 2026 are out, and IIT Indore is ranked #556 in the 'World University' category.

The GATE 2026 exam for admission to ME/MTech and PhD courses has concluded. Results are scheduled for release on Mar 19, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: JEE Advanced, GATE, IIT JAM, etc.

college_info.intro:
IIT Indore offers a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels through its departments, including the Department of Civil Engineering, the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, and the Department of Metallurgical Engineering & Materials Science Engineering, among others.
At the UG level, IIT Indore offers the BTech programme in the following branches: Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering and Materials Science, Mechanical Engineering, etc.
The BTech programme offered by IIT Indore is very popular among students. Among the various specialisations offered in the BTech programme, Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) is one of the most preferred specialisations among students. The IIT Indore BTech programme helps students build a strong foundation in Computer Science and Engineering and prepares them for a career in Software Development, Data Science, and Artificial Intelligence. The excellent placement record of the BTech CSE programme also makes it popular.
Below mentioned are the popular IIT Indore courses, along with fees and eligibility:

Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.review_title: It has excellent infrastructure, fair placements, and fair faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Around 94 percent of students get placed. The highest package offered is more than 1 croreper annum for a few students. The lowest package offered is 6 LPA. The average package offered is 25 LPA. Top companies like Texas Instruments, Analog Devices, and Nvidia hire students. 75 percent of students got internships in the above-mentioned companies. Top roles offered are in the semiconductor domain, analog, and digital roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has the best infrastructure among all IITs. It has top-class Wi-Fi, AC labs, an AC classroom, and a fully AC library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is top-notch. The unit system that IIT Indore follows is top-class, like an apartment. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is decent. Medical facilities are also good. A 24x7 ambulance and doctors are available. Sports and games domain is expanding. In the last year, we got an Olympic-level track. It also has other sports grounds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of IIT Indore - Indian Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Roles offered are software engineer, software developer, tester, mechanical engineer, civil engineer, and many core jobs. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Capgemini, Accenture, IBM, Wipro, etc. More than 90% of students get placed here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, in hostels as well as classrooms. The library is fully equipped with a vast collection of books, and a system is also provided. Medical facilities are available here. A dietitian, physician, and gynaecologist are also present here.

overview_faqs.question: How good is IIT Indore?
overview_faqs.answer: IIT Indore is a decade-old IIT that generally ranks among the top 16 Engineering institutes in NIRF. The university is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). Also, during IIT Indore placements 2022, the highest package (domestic and international) offered was INR 56 LPA and INR 73.90 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of IIT Indore include Samsung, Oracle, Flipkart, Bosch Hero, TATA Steel, L & T, BAJAJ, Deloitte, PwC, Samsung, Walmart, etc.

overview_faqs.question: What is the overall campus atmosphere and social scene at IIT Indore?
overview_faqs.answer: The overall campus of IIT Indore is safe with strict security for both girls and boys. IITI is well-known for its annual student initiatives and events. Hostel life at IIT Indore is one of the best in all the ITIs. Newly constructed hostel building in the permanent campus has a great infrastructure. Currently, the institute has six hostels out of which one is for female students and the other for married students. The hostel life is vibrant with 574 rooms each in 6 hostels. IITI also provides extracurricular activities with various clubs, fests, events and competitions.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at IIT Indore?
overview_faqs.answer: IIT Indore offers a variety of UG, PG and PhD courses in the streams of Engineering and Science. UG courses are offered across various specialisations including BTech in Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, etc. The total tuition fees for the BTech courses is around INR 8 Lacs.

review_summary.college_name: IIT Indore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: As IIT Indore is a second-gen IIT and currently under progress, and in particular my course, e.g, chemical engineering students have not passed as this course is new, only started in 2023, but the recent result of the inter IIT tech meet was outstanding for IIT Indore, as it reached the podium, it is the only second gen IIT to do these.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels of IIT Indore are the best among the IITs. It has a 5bhk type design of hostels, and each hostel has its own badminton ground accessible to students 24/7, and being the second generation IIT, it has really nice infrastructure. We have an iconic pod building designed in a very different manner, and administrative buildings, and there is a very good library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied overall. Placements are improving every year.

content.Placements: Nearly 90-95 percent of B.Tech electrical engineering students got placed from IIT Indore last year which is really a large figure. The highest grossed by non-core students last year is nearly 1 crore per annum. The average package is nearly 26 LPA-27 LPA. Top recruiting companies for us students are Goldman Sachs, Nvidia, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Best infrastructure and best hostel life. The library here is much better and consists of thousands of books. IIT Indore's hostel is the best among all IITs (according to me) as it consists of a unit system (bhk system) with good Wi-Fi labs are good. IIT Indore has a very good campus with all facilities like medical care, sports, hygienic mess, and canteen.

content.Placements: We are the first batch in our course. We are offered roles such as propulsion systems manager, satellite data analyst, etc., of positions given to us by the space companies. We are also offered government jobs under DRDO and ISRO, which are central government jobs.

admission_overview.description: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Indore offers UG, PG, and Doctoral level courses, namely BTech, MTech, MSc, and PhD through three departments of the institute: Admissions at IIT Indore are based on national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced, GATE, IIT JAM, UGC NET, and CSIR NET. Candidates who meet the initial cutoff must appear counselling and personal interview rounds for final seat allocation.

eligibility_selection.title: IIT Indore Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: IIT Indore course admission is done through various national-level entrance exams. While merit is the basic eligibility for all the IIT Indore courses, admission to each one of them is entrance exam-based. The institute considers the scores of various entrance exams conducted at the national level. The JEE Advanced 2025 official website has launched with the new eligibility criteria. As per the official website, candidates can now attempt the JEE Advanced exam a maximum of three times in three consecutive years. paragraphs: IIT Indore's admission processconsists of the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list, and counselling. Candidates who wish to receive admission to IIT Indore must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and apply online before the last date of application. Students may look below for a breakdown on the IIT Indore application process:
1. IIT Indore Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at IIT Indore are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. For example, forIIT Indore BTech, candidates are required toapply for JEE Main followed by JEE Advancedapplication. Similarly, for the MSc, IIT JAM application formis required to be completed.
2. Selection Rounds

IIT Indore admits students to BTech courses based on JEE Main and JEE Advanced scores. Candidates are allotted seats inJoSAA Counselling for BTech, BTech-MTech (Dual Degree), and BS courses.Admission to MTech is through GATE followed by COAP Counselling. The institute considersIIT JAMandCCMN CounsellingforMSc courses. Candidates can check with the admission office for the selection rounds of the rest of the courses.
3. Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

TheIIT Indore cutofffor BTech, MTech, and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. IIT Indore will release the course-wise merit list for merit-based courses on its official website. As per the merit list, candidates are called for counselling for seat allotment. Shortlisted candidates must then pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

IIT Indore course feesinclude multiple components, such as one-time payment, tuition fees, mess charges, and hostel fees. Some of these components are charged only once at the time of admission, while the remaining are to be paid either annually or semester-wise as per the institute's guidelines. The mode of payment is online. Tabulated below are theIIT Indore feesfor various courses:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get into IIT Indore BTech without JEE?
faqs.answer: No, IIT Indore BTech admission is strictly entrance based. Admission to IIT Indore BTech is allotted on the basis of candidates' performance in JEE Main exam, candidates who qualify IIT Indore JEE Main cutoff are then required to appear for JEE Advance followed by  the counselling round conducted by JoSAA. JEE Main is also the eligibility test for JEE Advanced. Only those candidates who have qualified for JEE Main are eligible to appear for JEE Advanced entrance test for admission to IIT Indore

faqs.question: How can I get admission at IIT Indore for BTech?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BTech programme is completely entrance exam-based, i.e., based on JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced scores. Candidates seeking admission to BTech can not get admission to IIT Indore with only the scores of JEE Main. JEE Advanced followed by JoSAA counselling is the only selection criteria followed by the institute. placement_data.title: IIT Indore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement process at IIT Indore includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. The final placements at IIT Indore are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students

As per external sources, a total of 373 students were placed during the placement season. The highest package recorded for BTech and MTech stood at INR 137 LPA and INR 54 LPA , respectively. For MS and MSc the highest package offered during IIT Indore placements was INR 49 LPA and INR 12.5 LPA. The highest placement percentage was for MS (R) which was 85.71% followed by BTech for which the placement rate was 85.44%.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during IIT Indore placements?
faqs.answer: The IIT Indore average package offered to BTech students during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 25.45 LPA. Further, the IIT Indore CSE average package offered in 2023 stood at INR 32.60 LPA. The course-wise average package offered during IIT Indore placements 2023 are presented below: Course Average Package (2023) BTech INR 25.45 LPA MTech INR 9.96 LPA MSc INR 10.8 LPA MS INR 19.4 LPA The branch-wise average package offered during IIT Indore BTech placements 2023 are presented below: BTech Branch Average Package (2023) Computer Science INR 32.60 LPA Electrical INR 25.70 LPA Mechanical INR 21.88 LPA Civil INR 17.37 LPA Metallurgical & Materials Science INR 18.95 LPA

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters during IIT Indore placements?
faqs.answer: IIT Indore top recruiters: IIT Indore Top - Recruiters 2023 Amazon Wipro Samsung Jio Flipkart Optum Walmart Qualcomm Accenture Larsen & Toubro

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at IIT Indore?
faqs.answer: IIT Indore offers a variety of UG, PG and PhD courses in the streams of Engineering and Science. UG courses are offered across various specialisations including BTech in Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, etc. The total tuition fees for the BTech courses is around INR 8 Lacs.

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package offered in IIT Indore?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, 89.76% of the BTech batch 2023 and 65.38% of the M.Tech batch 2023 were placed in the reputed companies during IIT Indore placements 2023. The IIT Indore the highest and average package offered during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 68 LPA and INR 25.45 LPA to the BTech students. The top recruiters of IIT Indore placement in 2023 included Amazon, Microsoft, Flipkart, Samsung, Optum, Oracle, Goldman Sachs, etc..

description: IIT Indore cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT Indore JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view the IIT Indore year-wise cutoff ranks for different categories belonging to the AI quota. Click on the 'Download Now' link to view the JEE Advanced cutoff details for the Indian Institute of Technology Indore.

IIT Indore cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT Indore JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 11274 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 177

IIT Indore B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 1775 and 11274, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 2099 and 3723, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT Indore. highlights.description:
IIT Indore is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies, both national & international, have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #27 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Overall, #12 under Engineering, and #24 under Research Institutions. At the global level, the QS World 2025 ranked the institute at #477 position. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the IIT Indore rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
Over the years, IIT Indore has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the IIT Indore's rankings in 'Overall' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, IIT Indore climbed 6 ranks to #27 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Engineering' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, IIT Indore climbed 4 ranks to #12 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Research Institutions' category have displayed an increasing trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Indore climbed 3 ranks to #24 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the IIT Indore latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

comparison.college: SRM Institute of Science and Technology

qs_world.description:
IIT Indore has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Indore fell 79 ranks to #556 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Indore climbed 25 ranks to #229 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT Indore climbed 7 ranks to #47 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

hostel.description: Presently around 600 students are residing in the hostel of IIT Indore. The rooms are spacious and large and looks out to the nearby mountains, RO system installed in every room to provide safe water.  The hostel has wireless internet connectivity and many other recreational facilities.

library.description: The library has a collection of over 29,000+ books, which includes, in addition to text books and reference books, a fine collection of books on literature and English language and a select collection of books on sports, biographies, and general interest titles. The magazines and newspaper section includes popular magazines and newspapers both in English and Hindi. The library provides its users access to more than 6000 e-journals through individual as well as fulltext database such as ACM digital libray, Elsevier Science Direct, Springer link, IEEE XPlore, JSTOR.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court

cafeteria.description: The Institute has well maintained, spacious and hygienic dining halls both for Veg and Non. Veg food. Students are provided four meals a day: breakfast, lunch, evening snacks and dinner. Mess Menu is regularly updated and changed as per students' demand.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostels of IIT Indore are the best among the IITs. It has a 5bhk type design of hostels, and each hostel has its own badminton ground accessible to students 24/7, and being the second generation IIT, it has really nice infrastructure. We have an iconic pod building designed in a very different manner, and administrative buildings, and there is a very good library.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied overall. Placements are improving every year.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure and best hostel life. The library here is much better and consists of thousands of books. IIT Indore's hostel is the best among all IITs (according to me) as it consists of a unit system (bhk system) with good Wi-Fi labs are good. IIT Indore has a very good campus with all facilities like medical care, sports, hygienic mess, and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent infrastructure, fair placements, and fair faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has the best infrastructure among all IITs. It has top-class Wi-Fi, AC labs, an AC classroom, and a fully AC library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is top-notch. The unit system that IIT Indore follows is top-class, like an apartment. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is decent. Medical facilities are also good. A 24x7 ambulance and doctors are available. Sports and games domain is expanding. In the last year, we got an Olympic-level track. It also has other sports grounds...

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIT Indore - Indian Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, in hostels as well as classrooms. The library is fully equipped with a vast collection of books, and a system is also provided. Medical facilities are available here. A dietitian, physician, and gynaecologist are also present here.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities with the most professional lecturers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are perfect. Food is the best here. Sports and games are amazing. Wi-Fi is not so good at our hostel. It is one of the drawbacks of my college. We have amazing labs at our college. We often visit KV to conduct our experiments.

reviews.review_heading: College has a good environment. Placements, infrastructure, and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: There are separate labs and equipment established according to the course requirements with proper Wi-Fi availability. There are good classrooms in size and proper wooden benches. There are separate hostels for 1st year and 2nd year with double sharing rooms and 3rd, 4th year live in the same hostel. Good Wi-Fi is available in hostel room, and every day clean every unit properly. Hostels are best.

reviews.review_heading: This is the only IIT college where placement and infrastructure are both very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of IIT Indore is one of the best in India. Hostel of this college looks like a hotel. There is a common room for every 5 students. Every student of this college gets single from the first year. Although from this year, first-year students have to share a single room with one partner due to an increase in branches in B.Tech. Everything is here when it comes to the facility.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college because of good education.
reviews.review_text: There are proper labs and smart boards which help in better education. Wi-Fi is available, classrooms are high-tech as an IIT. Slides are shared well enough. Hostel is double sharing and the quality is very good two proper beds. Sports facilities have improved.

reviews.review_heading: All about Masters at IIT Indore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are all very good. Each classroom and lab is air-conditioned. The hostel facility is very nice. The washrooms and rooms are clean. Campus life is very good. The mess provides good quality food. The sports complex has a badminton court, swimming pool, and gym facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is a little bad. Other than that, all is good. There are double-sharing rooms; 3rd and 4th years get single-sharing rooms. The library is closed on holidays, but the self-study center is open 24/7. Food is not bad, but don't expect too much. You will live in a unit, 4 BHK. There are washrooms in each unit too.

reviews.review_heading: The campus of IIT Indore .
reviews.review_text: There are total five to six hostel at IIT INDORE campus which includes namely CVR, VSB DA, HJB etc. There are five practical building and Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The quality of mess food is quite good and it has its own health center and sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: A students honest review of IIT Indore by Raja Reddy. Mentioning the advantage of IIT.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is great and is considered the best of all IITs, with modern infrastructure combined. It has buildings like hostels, mess, lecture halls, and an auditorium, all within walking distance of one another. A beautiful sports complex is under construction, and an Inter IIT event is going to happen this year.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the overall quality of the college .
reviews.review_text:
Full marks on infrastructure and facilities with high-class labs and classrooms are there. All the extra facilities provided are up to par. Hostels are clean and the hostel staff is really helpful. We do have good-quality food in canteens and mess. Do get regular mess food checked.
.

reviews.review_heading: A well defined review of IIT Indore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are in top condition at IIT Indore. Labs are well maintained and funded as well. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, provided by the institute. Classrooms are equipped with digital screens and AC's are seated, which is also very comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: IIT INDORE : Best Campus Life With Greater Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There are well-equipped labs in buildings with free Wi-Fi access, big LED screens, and modern teaching classrooms with good-quality sound speakers. The infrastructure of every building is modern and beautiful. The Wi-Fi service is available in every hostel, lab, classroom, and auditorium. The hostel facilities are good too. We will find two student occupancy rooms, four rooms, two toilets, two washrooms, one kitchen, one living room, one balcony, and two sets of very high-quality chairs. The roo...

data.description: IIT Indore has some of the top faculty across the nation. The institute has faculty members who gained their educational qualifications from the world's top institutes. The members have adequate experience in their respective fields. The faculty members at the institute are always keen on providing education in n engaging way.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IIT Indore - Indian Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top companies, including De Shaw, Goldman Sachs, Arcesium, Amazon, Flipkart, Walmart, Samsung, Salesforce, etc., come for on-campus recruitment.
The placements were very good but were mostly focused on the Computer Science domain.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila, a candidate must have qualified in the 10+2 examination and appeared in the IIT-JEE examination.The application fee for the B.Tech. program at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila is INR 750 per program. For SC/ST candidates of M.P. domicile, the fee is INR 400 per program.The application fee can be paid online through mponline.gov.in. faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.

In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4.1 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Takshashila Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DAVV Indore is a good college.

content.Placements: Many companies come for placements. Top companies from Indore also come for placements. The DAVV Placement Cell conducts exams for particular companies. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed with good packages. In 2026, the average package at Infosys is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Boys’ and girls’ hostels are available with proper hygiene. The boys’ hostel closes at 11 PM, and the girls’ hostel closes at 9 PM. Two students share one room. Each room has an almirah, table, chair, and internet connection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. + M. Tech. in IT - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My life at the IET DAVV Indore (Madhya Pradesh).

content.Placements: I am currently in the 1st semester, so I don't know too much about placements, but I can say that placements are not too good in our college as compared to NITs and IIITs. The highest package offered is 39 LPA, which was offered in the year 2023. The average package offered is around 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc., are available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are extraordinary. They have a good sense of humour, so they can make us laugh. They do not insult anyone to make us laugh. They are just good human beings. There are 4 exams per semester, 3 MSTs, and one end-semester exam. The best of 2 out of 3 will be taken as a result of MST. I am currently in the first semester of the Information Technology course. My course is about the IT sector, and I know the value of that. Our faculty members are good at teaching and friendly with students like us who didn't get the lecture the first time.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the food in the hostel.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 8 CGPA or more. No backlogs. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA-4 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA- 8 LPA. Companies are Wipro, Infosys, and TCS. The percentage of students is about 8 CGPA, and the company is Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi of the hostel network is good. Labs are also outstanding, but the lectures are minimal. My suggestion is that the food in the hostel and the water are not good, so I do not eat there. Medical facilities are not available in the college. These are outside the college. I have no idea about sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government college. I got decent marks in JEE Main.

content.Placements: This course is new, and in this college, this is the first year of this course. Overall, across all CS branches, the highest package offered is 57 LPA. The average package ranges from 10-12 LPA. Microsoft, Google India, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Adobe, etc., are the main companies that came for placements. 70 percent of students got internships from this course in small tech companies. Senior and junior software engineer roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus area is good and huge. The college campus is covered with many trees and plants, and it seems like college is in the jungle. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all good facilities are available in the college for students. Mason canteen food is acceptable. College is directly connected with Indore Icchapur Highway. Sports and games happen in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ground-level information of DAVV.

content.Placements: Above 60 percent of students got placed from every batch every year, and the remaining 40 percent are trying to find off-campus placement, but they don't get any support from the college. 1.5 LPA to 20 LPA is the package offered, and the average is 5 LPA to 8 LPA. TCS and Infosys are recruiting companies. 25 percent of students got internships in mostly TCS and Infosys. Web developer is the role offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good, but cleanliness is average, and all are available. The hostel is pretty nice, but the food quality is, as expected, average and sometimes below average. Medical facilities are available, and a canteen too, but the sports are rarely played.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Takshashila?
faqs.answer: No, Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya does not give direct admission to the students. Admission to various courses is based on merit and scores of entrance exams. Candidates need to write the CUET entrance exam which is conducted by the NTA. After clearing the CUET entrance exam, students may get a provisional allotment of seats in the college. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya admission to most of the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes is offered on the basis of marks scored in the Common University Entrance Test.Candidates can choose the type of admission they are seeking, which can be through one of the following:Type 1 - Through CUETType 2 - Through Department level TestType 3 - Through merit in the qualifying examination.The application fee for all types of admissions is INR 1,550.
