hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Raipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Amity university provides apartment-style accommodation facility with suites of bedrooms that share a common lounge and bathroom.The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment. The university offers free laundry service.

Amity university provides apartment-style accommodation facility with suites of bedrooms that share a common lounge and bathroom.The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment. The university offers free laundry service.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Physics Lab, Biotechnology Lab, Media Lab, Engineering Lab

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the campus is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is totally good for the BBA and hostel, and the facilities provided are also good. Facilities in the hostel have been improved and now they take proper care of everything. There are useless restrictions that are imposed on students that need to be stopped.

reviews.review_heading: The university has a great performance in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the university are excellent, like unlimited Wi-Fi, good furniture, an AC dining hall, a green campus, and good infrastructure. The classroom has ACs. There is a cleanliness on the campus, and it has a ragging-free atmosphere, is under CCTV surveillance, and provides medical facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning and experience from Amity.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for learning is excellent. The studio is equipped with all the necessary equipment for our learning. The classrooms have Wi-Fi. The library has books for all departments. It has computers for e-learning where students can access journals. The hostel facility is good. They provide two sharing rooms. There are 3 hostels currently. There are common rooms, game rooms, and a dance room for students' engagement. The mess area is quite big, accommodation for the students. Th...

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured curriculum and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Overall, our college has a good infrastructure having all the required labs, with high-speed internet connections available for all the students. Our college has a wide range of books available in high-class libraries and has a vast collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. The hostel facilities are designed for our comfort and convenience, offering both AC and non-AC rooms with essential amenities like Wi-Fi, Laundry, and security.

reviews.review_heading: Insight of Amity University Raipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by the college is top-notch. The library has vast resources, fully equipped sports facilities, and well-maintained classrooms, making it a conducive environment for learning and recreation. The campus design, with its modern amenities and green spaces, ensures a balance between study and relaxation.

reviews.review_heading: Details of Amity University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is well-furnished with projectors and air-conditioned classrooms. In hostel, there are 3 rooms for 6 students sharing, one washroom and one bathroom. Mess is provided but not good in taste. The quality of food is bad. Although, it's good for making fun memories.

reviews.review_heading: Once an amitian always an amitian.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure at this college is good. It has many facilities, including Wi-Fi, a library, and an auditorium. The quality and quantity of the food are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very pleasant campus with all the facilities available.
reviews.review_text: As being a biotechnology student, we are provided with very good lab facilities with all the necessities available! Lab hours are also scheduled in a very efficient manner! Wi-Fi is provided 24*7! Classrooms are big with a strength of 60 students! Medical facilities are also available! We have a canteen and food trucks in our campus!

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The maintenance of classrooms and labs is very good and the canteen is hygienic. Our college is also good at sports. Wi-Fi equipment is provided on campus. The library is very big with many authors available there. The hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Great facilities, and the campus is so good.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure with a good campus building, and there are washrooms and a parking area. The college offers facilities like free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and well-equipped labs. The library is useful to students, and the hostels and mess are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, experience during studies was good.
reviews.review_text: Transportation, air-conditioned classrooms, a mess, and a canteen were the facilities, and infrastructure was newly built. The campus was small and far from the city. The quality of the food was not good. Students got food poisoning due to the bad and unhealthy food. Sports and games competitions used to take place, like badminton and basketball, majorly.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus and has great facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities for students. The facilities provided are separate hostels for boys and girls with free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, labs and a well-stocked library. The mess is hygienic. The infrastructure is good with proper buildings and a pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: A brief information about Amity University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available and the campus is full of AC. Everything is good, but the quality of the food is the worst. We have a canteen, but most of the time it won't have food to buy, and outside food is not allowed on campus, even if it is homely food.

reviews.review_heading: Best private college in Chhattisgarh for our BBA course.
reviews.review_text: There are beautiful classrooms on our campus, with windows and A.C. All students are allowed to access free Wi-Fi. Overall, the infrastructure of the campus is very good. The hostel also has good infrastructure, providing facilities 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Amity university review by Seven Noel.
reviews.review_text: The syllabus is well structured and covers a good amount of all subjects and appropriate knowledge. As a hosteler, the food quality is average, the sports facilities are not that up-to-date, and the sports complex is not that developed but is improving .

data.description: CAT is one of the accepting exam for Amity Raipur MBA admission. However, it is not mandatory to get admission through CAT score. Candidates can also qualify other national-level Management entrance exams such as MAT / GMAT / GRE or Amity Test to get admission in MBA programme. For MBA International, aspirants can apply with XAT/ MAT/ CMAT /GMAT/ NMAT / AMCAT score. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round for selection.

paragraphs: Amity Raipur provides merit-based scholarships to students pursuing a course. Check below the UG scholarship details:
Scholarship %
Amity Raipur Scholarship Criteria
Class 12 in CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards (2023/ 2022/ 2021) with at least 93% aggregate
Physical Education/ Fine Arts/ Performing Arts/ Vocational/ non-written subjects excluded from the aggregate computation
Class 12 in CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards (2023/ 2022/ 2021) with at least 88% aggregate
Physical Education/ Fine Arts/ Performing Arts/ Vocational/ non-written subjects excluded from the aggregate computation
Class 12 in CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards (2023/ 2022/ 2021) with at least 70% aggregate
Physical Education/ Fine Arts/ Performing Arts/ Vocational/ non-written subjects excluded from the aggregate computation
Note: On-admission scholarships are applicable in the first year only. Second year onwards continuation scholarship rules apply.

The total tuition fee for Amity University Raipur BBA ranges between INR 3.18 Lacs and INR 6.60 Lacs as per an unofficial source. After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to pay a fee to confirm their seat. The university shortlists candidates for BBA course based on merit in the last qualifying exam or CUET-UG score. In case, the candidate is unable to pay fee within the stipulated time, the admission stands cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission to Amity Raipur .

Amity Raipur BTech fee for a four-year BTech programme range between INR 3.84 Lacs and INR 5.76 lakh. The course-fee varies from each BTech specialisation. After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to pay a fee to confirm their seat. Additionally, they must also pay an application fee of INR 1,500 for admission to Amity Raipur .

highlights.summary: The International School of Design admission 2025 is open. Candidates can visit the official website and follow the instructions to apply online.

table.details: Vogue Interior, Fine Edge, Orient Craft

college_info.intro: International School of Design flagship programmes are its certificate courses, BDes, and BSc. The college offers various courses at UG, PG, and Diploma levels. INSD Ahmedabad is mainly concerned with streams such as Graphics Design, Fashion Design, Interior Design, Jewellery Design, Textile Design, and many more. Candidates can check the INSD Ahmedabad popular programmes in the table given below:

placements.overview:
International School of Design placement 2025 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. However, the college has decent connections with national as well as international brands such as Vogue Interior, Au Finja, Benetton, etc. As a result, the institute offers decent placement opportunities to its students. Further, the International School of Design Ahmedabad placement cell also offers several workshops to students for resume building, cover letter writing, cracking aptitude tests, mock interviews, and more.

Every year, INSD Ahmedabad arranges a placement fair that leads top-notch companies to participate and offer placement opportunities to budding designers. Students are allowed to interact with industry experts and professional designers to help prepare for the interviews.

faqs.answer: A:    International School of Design Ahmedabad has decent connections with national as well as international brands such as Vogue Interior, Au Finja, Benetton, etc. As a result, the companies facilitate students at INSD Ahmedabad with placement assistance. The International School of Design top recruiters are Au Finja, Danish Design, JJ Valaya, Mia by Tanishq, Superhouse Group, Vogue Interiors, Study by Janak, Finedge, Benetton, Marks & Spencer, Skyler, and many more.
faqs.question: What are the top recruiters at the International School of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    International School of Design, Ahmedabad does not offer any kind of concession for the MBA course. All candidates will be evaluated on the basis of the same eligibility criteria and will be charged the same course fees.Candidates can secure scholarships at ISD Ahmedabad if they require assistance in paying the MBA fees.
faqs.question: Is their any concession for MBA at International School of Design, Ahmedabad?

faqs.answer: A:    No, internships have not been listed as part of the MBA curriculum at International School of Design, Ahmedabad. Instead, candidates are required to pursue several projects for the purpose of completing their International School of Design, Ahmedabad MBA curriculum.The projects are different across the three MBA specialisations offered by the institute.
faqs.question: Are internships a part of the International School of Design, Ahmedabad MBA curriculum?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
International School of Design courses are approved by UGC & are offered at levels like UG, PG, Diploma, & Certificate. The college has courses under various departments like Graphic Design, Animation Design, Interior Design, Fashion Design, etc.

INSD Ahmedabad has diploma courses available for students in Photography, Fashion Styling, Digital Marketing, etc. Further, the college also gives a range of certificate courses like Fashion Sketching, Drapes & Draping Methods, Costume Jewellery, Corel Draw, etc. to provide a solid foundation in several design disciplines.

faqs.answer: A:    There are no mandatory entrance exams that candidates need to appear for in order to qualify for International School of Design, Ahmedabad MBA courses. Candidates who have completed their UG level graduation can apply directly for MBA at International School of Design, Ahmedabad.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted at International School of Design, Ahmedabad for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    A BSc in Animation offers a strong foundation for a career in the following areas:Animation: 2D & 3D animation, character design, storyboardingGaming: Game design, concept art,  3D modeling, game animationVFX (Visual Effects): VFX artist, compositor, motion graphics designerOther Creative Fields: Graphic design, concept art for film/TV, web design (depending on program)The job market is competitive, but with strong skills and a good portfolio, you'll find opportunities in studios, production houses, advertising agencies, and more.

You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. It is mainly concerned with the designing domain and hence, offers UG and PG courses such as Textile Designing, MBA in Fashion Designing, MSc in Interior Designing, etc. Further, the institute even offers certificate and Diploma courses to students with a duration of 1-2 years.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good teachers, placements, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I have seen every senior getting placed. I can say that 100% of the interior design students got internships. Poorvankara, Vaishnavi, and Salarpuria Sattva are the major recruiting companies for our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have a so-called campus vibe. It is a building situated in Koramangala. We get access to Wi-Fi for academic purposes. We have a decent classroom to occupy a maximum of 20 students. There is a hall on the top floor where combined classes and events take place. Labs and a library are also available. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, but the college coordinators help students find the best PGs nearby. We have an integration day happening every year where we have football and cricket competitions between different batches. Mess and canteen services are available. They are good.

review_content.Infrastructure: It has big classrooms. Each classroom can accommodate around 20 students. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. There is a library with design books you can refer to. The college also provides Mac labs. There is a projector in every classroom. The quality of food available at the canteen is also very good.

faqs.answer: Yes, LISAA School of Design Bangalore is a good college. LISAA School of Design is a private college and offers a range of Diploma, Undergraduate, and Postgraduate courses in Design, including Fashion Design, Interior Design, Graphic Design, Filmmaking, Product Design, etc. The school is run by CREO Valley and affiliated with Bengaluru City University, recognised by Karnataka Government. LISAA School of Design Postgraduate and Diploma courses are certified by Jawaharlal Nehru Technical Education (JNTE) and QAI.
faqs.question: Q: Is LISAA School of Design a good college?

faqs.answer: LISAA School of Design offers a number of courses at UG, PG, Diploma levels etc. LISAA School of Design admissions are entrance based with the institute accepting scores of LISAA CAT scores for the same. Under the UG category students can enroll in their desired courses such as Interior & Product Design, Fashion & Textile Design, Graphics, UI/UX, Illustrations and Web Design, BSc in Film Making, and much more. Under the Diploma category, courses under the specialisation of Interior Design and Business Management (MBA), Fashion Design and Business Management (MBA), and Diploma in Fashion Design, Interior Design, and Graphic Design are offered.
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore?

faqs.answer: Candidates are admitted to the various programmes at LISAA School of Design based on entrance exam, followed by personal interview. Candidates can apply for the courses via online application. Candidates can follow the steps below:Step 1: Submit the inquiry form and register for LISAA’s Creative Aptitude Test (CAT).Step 2: Admission team will send the entrance test and other details via email.Step 3: The student has about 6 hours to complete the exam and submit the scanned answer sheet via email.Step 4: Results are usually declared within 24 hours (please reach out to your Admission Team member if you do not hear within this timeframe).Step 5: A personal interview through Skype, phone, or in-person and a portfolio assessment (if required) are conducted after the declaration of the result.Step 6: Submit the fee within 10 days of receiving confirmation to reserve the seat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphics and Communications Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A general review of my college.

content.Placements: I have not yet been placed, as I am still in my second year of study, but our seniors did mention that about 80 to 90% of them were placed and that it had been a learning experience and an insight into job interviews and job hunting overall. It helped them know what companies expected of the applicants.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus in general has a main building that has all the classrooms, a small canteen, a medium-sized canteen area behind the building, a small bamboo grove, basement parking, and two computer labs equipped with Mac and Windows systems. The college provides speedy Wi-Fi as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphics and Communications Design - Batch of 2025

admission_process.title: LISAA School of Design Bangalore Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: LISAA School of Designhas an entrance based admission pocess. The process starts with the application process, conducted in the online mode. The college conducts its own entrance examination,LISAA CATfor admission into the offered courses. Students must appear for the exam first and then apply for the preferred programme at LISAA School of Design. Find below a step-wise explanation of LISAA School of Design admission process:
lists: LISAA CAT: Go to the official website and fill the enquiry form, after which adfmission counsellor from the admission team will get in touch to help in guiding for the entrance test.
Application: After appearing for the exam and recieving the results, go to the official website and login to fill the application form.
Application Review: The college will review the applications of all candidates after the application deadline and make a merit list of selected candidates on the basis of their entrance scores.
Document Verification: Selected students will be called for an offline document verification.
Admission Confirmation:Those selected, must pay the admission fee in order to confirm the allotted seat. Failure to do so, will lead to automatic cancellation of the candidature.

faqs.question: What is LISAA CAT exam at LISAA School of Design Bangalore?
faqs.answer: LISAA Creative Aptitude Test (CAT)is conducted by LISAA School of Design to discover the natural aptitude and interest of aspiring Design students. The test evaluates the skill, power of observation, innovation, design ability, and mental ability, quantitative ability (class 10 maths), analytical ability, communicative english, english comprehension, and general knowledge of the candidate. The exam duration is 2 to 4 hours. Candidates can visit the official website and apply for the exam.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Des at LISAA School of Design, Bangalore?
faqs.answer: Admission to the LISAA School Of Design is subject to an entrance test (called LISAA CAT – Creative Aptitude Test) or through a personal interview. LISAA CAT is conducted to evaluate candidates’ Aptitude, Career Focus & Creativity.Admission to all the courses will be given on the basis of LISAA CAT results, conducted by the college followed by an interview. The duration of the test is about 2-4 hours. Selected candidates will be called for an Interview. A portfolio review is optional.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Stitching Lab, iMac/ PC Labs, Sewing Lab

reviews.review_heading: A general review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus in general has a main building that has all the classrooms, a small canteen, a medium-sized canteen area behind the building, a small bamboo grove, basement parking, and two computer labs equipped with Mac and Windows systems. The college provides speedy Wi-Fi as well.

reviews.review_heading: COLLEGE REVIEW (lisaa school design).
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure, there is a canteen that provides food. Some Classrooms provide required facilities like laptops. There is no library which could be a sphere of improvement. Facilities for foundation year is provided like art supplies etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have a so-called campus vibe. It is a building situated in Koramangala. We get access to Wi-Fi for academic purposes. We have a decent classroom to occupy a maximum of 20 students. There is a hall on the top floor where combined classes and events take place. Labs and a library are also available. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, but the college coordinators help students find the best PGs nearby. We have an integration day happening every year where we ha...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has great courses and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has big classrooms. Each classroom can accommodate around 20 students. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. There is a library with design books you can refer to. The college also provides Mac labs. There is a projector in every classroom. The quality of food available at the canteen is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The campus is sophisticated, with colourfully painted walls. The canteen serves delicious and homey food. Classrooms have air conditioning and other necessary amenities. There are two computer labs and a reading room. The college is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Experience at Lisaa school of design, Bangalore was good.
reviews.review_text: I would suggest you have your own laptops without completely relying on the labs in college. Being an outsider you will find some difficulty to find a stay nearby since there is no hostel on the campus. Nevertheless the management will help you out by suggesting a good PG within walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: Lisaa is a good place to discover your designing skills and be industry ready.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure, with mac lab, PC lab, sewing lab, library, workshops and plenty of classrooms. There are good classrooms for studio classes as well. I have not opted for hostel. I have heard that they have good tie-ups. There is a canteen with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms were provided but was not very consistent in terms of quality. It would appreciated if the college provided proper software in the labs and better Wi-Fi connection. Canteen facilities kept changing and was not consistent. Would recommend more sports activities for better productivity in academics.

reviews.review_heading: LISAA is the place to learn and enjoy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with all sorts of facilities such as canteen, Wi-Fi, advanced classrooms and labs. We have a mac lab too for which I feel really lucky to be a part of LISSA. Sadly there is no hostel yet, but we can find flats and PGs nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Lissa School of Design, Bangalore has one of the best infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
We were facilitated with high-speed wi-fi, Mac labs, Classrooms with projectors, cafeteria, Library. The quality of the food was decent enough in the canteen.
We used to go out for outdoor games like football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Its a good college with good name, but then management is a messed up else all is good.
reviews.review_text: 'A' grade infrastructure with Mac labs, studios for photography and shoots, a workshop for product and interior design, labs for fashion design. The canteen provides decent quality food, and it's mostly homemade food. Our college has recently moved to a new address, so the building is little messed up.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Our campus is fully air-conditioned. Classrooms have adequate benches and comfortable seats. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled and the speed is very fast. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for designing students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Our campus is situated in a hilly area.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are interested in the design field around Bangalore city.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not available at the college. There are a lot of PGs for boys and girls available within 1 km of campus, which are budget-friendly. A few of them are tied up with the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LISAA School of Design, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. There are computer labs and good Wi-Fi. We are also provided with projectors in the classrooms. It helps teachers to teach us more conveniently. We don't have a hostel facility. Overall, everything is good.

college_info.college_name: LISAA School of Design Scholarship Details

paragraphs: LISAA awards merit-based scholarships to new entrants in all UG programmes, which allows students with limited means to achieve their desired goals in the field of Art and Design. The scholarships are awarded based on the performance of the student during the admissions process (the entrance test and the interview). Scholarships are only available to a limited number of students and are awarded on a first-come, first-served basis.
